recipes.name: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Perfectly soft and chewy chocolate chip cookies with crispy edges

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
In a small bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
In a large bowl, beat butter and both sugars until creamy and smooth.
Add vanilla and eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Gradually beat in the flour mixture until just combined.
Stir in chocolate chips.
Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto prepared baking sheets, 2 inches apart.
Bake for 9-11 minutes until edges are golden brown.
Cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes, then transfer to wire racks.

recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Roman pasta dish with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and black pepper

steps.description: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
While pasta cooks, heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add pancetta and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the pancetta and cook for 1 minute. Remove from heat.
In a bowl, whisk eggs, both cheeses, and black pepper until well combined.
Drain pasta, reserving 1/2 cup of pasta water.
Working quickly, add hot pasta to the skillet with pancetta and toss to combine.
Pour egg mixture over pasta and toss rapidly until sauce thickens, adding reserved pasta water as needed.
Serve immediately with additional cheese and parsley garnish.

recipes.name: Chicken Stir-Fry
recipes.description: Quick and healthy vegetable and chicken stir-fry with savory sauce

steps.description: In a small bowl, whisk soy sauce, honey, cornstarch, and 1/4 cup water. Set aside.
Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked through, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add all vegetables to the hot wok and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until crisp-tender.
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Return chicken to the wok and add the sauce mixture.
Cook, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens, about 1 minute.
Drizzle with sesame oil and garnish with green onions before serving.

recipes.name: Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: Classic Neapolitan pizza with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil

steps.description: Preheat oven to its highest setting (500°F/260°C) with a pizza stone if available.
Crush tomatoes by hand and mix with salt and olive oil.
Divide dough into 2 balls and let rest for 30 minutes.
On a floured surface, stretch each dough ball into a 10-inch circle.
Spread tomato sauce evenly over each pizza, leaving a small border.
Arrange mozzarella slices over the sauce.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
Top with fresh basil leaves and a drizzle of olive oil before serving.

recipes.name: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Flavorful ground beef tacos with all your favorite toppings

steps.description: In a large skillet, cook ground beef and onion over medium heat until beef is browned, about 8 minutes.
Drain excess fat from the skillet.
Stir in taco seasoning and tomato sauce. Simmer for 5 minutes until thickened.
Warm taco shells according to package directions.
Fill each shell with beef mixture.
Top with lettuce, tomatoes, cheese, sour cream, and salsa.

recipes.name: Banana Bread
recipes.description: Moist and delicious banana bread perfect for breakfast or snack

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
In another bowl, mix melted butter and sugar until well combined.
Beat in egg and vanilla, then stir in mashed bananas.
Fold in the flour mixture until just combined. Do not overmix.
Fold in walnuts if using.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 55-65 minutes.
Cool in pan for 10 minutes, then transfer to wire rack.

recipes.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.description: Comforting homemade chicken noodle soup perfect for cold days

steps.description: Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Brown chicken on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove chicken and set aside.
In the same pot, sauté onion, carrots, and celery until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Return chicken to pot, add broth, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to boil, then simmer for 30 minutes.
Remove chicken, shred with forks, and return to pot.
Add egg noodles and cook until tender, about 8 minutes.
Remove bay leaf and thyme sprigs. Stir in parsley and serve.

recipes.name: Guacamole
recipes.description: Fresh and creamy avocado dip perfect for parties

steps.description: Cut avocados in half, remove pits, and scoop flesh into a bowl.
Mash avocados with a fork to desired consistency.
Add onion, jalapeño, lime juice, cilantro, tomato, and garlic.
Season with salt and cumin and mix well.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

recipes.name: Pancakes
recipes.description: Fluffy homemade pancakes perfect for weekend breakfast

steps.description: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In another bowl, beat milk, egg, melted butter, and vanilla.
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and stir until just combined (batter should be lumpy).
Heat a lightly oiled griddle or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Pour or scoop about 1/4 cup batter onto the griddle for each pancake.
Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look dry, about 2 minutes.
Flip and cook until browned on the other side, about 2 minutes more.
Serve warm with butter and maple syrup.

recipes.name: Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Classic Caesar salad with homemade dressing and crunchy croutons

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F. Toss bread cubes with 2 tablespoons olive oil and 1 minced garlic clove.
Spread on baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes until golden. Set aside.
For dressing, mash remaining garlic and anchovies into a paste.
Whisk in egg yolk, lemon juice, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
Slowly drizzle in remaining olive oil while whisking constantly.
Stir in half the Parmesan and season with salt and pepper.
In a large bowl, toss lettuce with dressing until coated.
Top with croutons and remaining Parmesan cheese.

recipes.name: Beef Stroganoff
recipes.description: Creamy and comforting beef stroganoff with mushrooms over egg noodles

steps.description: Season beef with salt and pepper. Cook noodles according to package directions.
Heat butter in a large skillet over high heat. Brown beef in batches, about 2 minutes per batch. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, sauté onion and mushrooms until mushrooms release liquid and brown, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over vegetables and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually whisk in beef broth and bring to a simmer until thickened.
Return beef to skillet and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in sour cream and mustard.
Serve over egg noodles and garnish with parsley.

recipes.name: Vegetable Lasagna
recipes.description: Hearty lasagna packed with vegetables and creamy ricotta

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions.
Heat oil in large skillet. Sauté zucchini, squash, and mushrooms until tender, about 8 minutes.
Add spinach and garlic, cook until spinach wilts. Season with salt and pepper.
In a bowl, mix ricotta, egg, Parmesan, and half the mozzarella.
Spread 1 cup marinara in a 9x13 baking dish. Layer with 3 noodles.
Top with half the ricotta mixture, half the vegetables, and 1 cup sauce.
Repeat layers. Top with remaining noodles, sauce, and mozzarella.
Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes. Remove foil and bake 15 minutes more.
Let rest 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Fish Tacos
recipes.description: Baja-style fish tacos with cabbage slaw and creamy sauce

steps.description: In a bowl, whisk flour, baking powder, salt, and beer until smooth. Let rest 10 minutes.
For slaw, mix cabbage, sour cream, mayonnaise, half the lime juice, and cilantro. Season with salt.
Cut fish into 2-inch strips and pat dry. Season with salt.
Heat 1/2 inch oil in a skillet to 350°F.
Dip fish in batter, letting excess drip off. Fry until golden, 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with salt.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet.
Assemble tacos with fish, slaw, jalapeño, and remaining lime juice.

recipes.name: Apple Pie
recipes.description: Classic American apple pie with a flaky crust and cinnamon-spiced filling

ingredients.name: Granny Smith apples, peeled and sliced

steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F. Roll out half the dough and fit into a 9-inch pie plate.
In a large bowl, mix apples with sugars, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and lemon juice.
Pour apple mixture into pie crust and dot with butter.
Roll out remaining dough and place over filling. Trim and crimp edges.
Cut slits in top crust for steam vents. Brush with egg wash.
Bake for 15 minutes, then reduce temperature to 350°F.
Continue baking for 35-45 minutes until crust is golden and filling is bubbly.
Cool on wire rack for at least 2 hours before serving.

recipes.name: Chicken Parmesan
recipes.description: Breaded chicken breast topped with marinara and melted mozzarella

steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F. Pound chicken to even thickness.
Set up breading station: flour, beaten eggs, and breadcrumbs mixed with Parmesan.
Season chicken with salt and pepper. Dredge in flour, then egg, then breadcrumb mixture.
Heat oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Brown chicken on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Pour marinara sauce around (not on) the chicken.
Top each chicken breast with mozzarella cheese.
Transfer skillet to oven and bake until cheese melts and chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Serve over spaghetti with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.description: Creamy Italian risotto with earthy mushrooms and Parmesan

steps.description: Heat broth in a saucepan and keep warm over low heat.
Heat oil and 1 tablespoon butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Sauté mushrooms until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove half and set aside.
Add onion to pot and cook until softened, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook 1 minute.
Add rice and toast for 2 minutes until edges are translucent.
Add wine and stir until absorbed.
Add broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly, allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding more.
Continue until rice is creamy and al dente, about 20 minutes.
Stir in remaining mushrooms, butter, Parmesan, and thyme. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Shrimp Scampi
recipes.description: Garlicky shrimp in a buttery lemon sauce over pasta

steps.description: Cook linguine according to package directions. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water.
Season shrimp with salt and pepper.
Heat butter and oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp in a single layer and cook until pink, about 2 minutes per side. Remove shrimp.
Add garlic and red pepper flakes to skillet, cook for 1 minute.
Add lemon juice and zest, scraping up any brown bits.
Return shrimp to skillet, add drained pasta and parsley. Toss to combine.
Add pasta water if needed to create a light sauce.

recipes.name: French Onion Soup
recipes.description: Rich beef broth with caramelized onions topped with melted cheese and toasted bread

steps.description: In a large pot, melt butter with oil over medium heat. Add onions and cook for 25-30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until deeply caramelized.
Add wine and scrape up any browned bits from bottom. Cook until wine reduces by half.
Add broth, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to boil, then simmer for 15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper. Remove thyme sprigs and bay leaf.
Preheat broiler. Ladle soup into oven-safe bowls.
Top each bowl with a baguette slice and sprinkle generously with cheese.
Place bowls on a baking sheet and broil until cheese is bubbly and golden, about 2-3 minutes.

recipes.name: Pad Thai
recipes.description: Classic Thai stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, and peanuts

steps.description: Soak rice noodles in hot water until tender but firm, about 10 minutes. Drain.
Mix fish sauce, tamarind paste, and brown sugar in a small bowl.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add tofu and fry until golden, about 2 minutes.
Add shrimp and garlic, stir-fry until shrimp turns pink, about 2 minutes.
Push everything to the side, crack eggs into wok and scramble.
Add noodles and sauce mixture, toss everything together for 2 minutes.
Add bean sprouts and green onions, toss quickly.
Serve topped with crushed peanuts and lime wedges.

recipes.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
recipes.description: Individual chocolate cakes with a warm, gooey center

steps.description: Preheat oven to 450°F. Butter and flour 4 ramekins.
Melt chocolate and butter together in a double boiler or microwave, stirring until smooth.
In a bowl, whisk powdered sugar, eggs, and egg yolks until combined.
Whisk in melted chocolate mixture, then flour, vanilla, and salt until just combined.
Divide batter among prepared ramekins.
Place on baking sheet and bake for 12-14 minutes until edges are set but center is soft.
Let cool for 1 minute, then run a knife around edges and invert onto plates.
Serve immediately with vanilla ice cream.

recipes.name: Greek Salad
recipes.description: Fresh Mediterranean salad with feta, olives, and oregano

steps.description: In a large bowl, combine cucumber, tomatoes, onion, bell pepper, and olives.
In a small bowl, whisk olive oil, red wine vinegar, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Pour dressing over vegetables and toss gently.
Top with feta cheese and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Beef and Broccoli
recipes.description: Classic Chinese takeout-style beef and broccoli in a savory sauce

steps.description: In a bowl, toss beef with 1 tablespoon cornstarch until coated.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, brown sugar, and remaining cornstarch.
Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 1 minute, then drain.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add beef in a single layer and sear for 2 minutes without stirring.
Stir-fry beef for another minute until browned. Remove from wok.
Add garlic and ginger to wok, stir for 30 seconds.
Return beef to wok, add broccoli and sauce mixture. Stir-fry until sauce thickens, about 1 minute.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Blueberry Muffins
recipes.description: Soft and fluffy muffins bursting with fresh blueberries

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F. Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
In a bowl, whisk flour, baking powder, and salt.
In another bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla.
Alternately add flour mixture and milk, beginning and ending with flour.
Gently fold in blueberries.
Divide batter among muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
Bake for 18-20 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
Cool in pan for 5 minutes, then transfer to wire rack.

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Creamy and spiced Indian curry with tender chicken

steps.description: Mix yogurt with half the garlic, ginger, and spices. Marinate chicken for 30 minutes.
Preheat broiler. Place chicken on a baking sheet and broil until charred, about 8 minutes.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Cook onion until soft.
Add remaining garlic, ginger, and spices. Cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato sauce and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in cream and add chicken. Simmer for 5 more minutes.
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice or naan.

recipes.name: Caprese Salad
recipes.description: Simple Italian salad with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil

steps.description: Arrange alternating slices of mozzarella and tomatoes on a platter.
Tuck basil leaves between the slices.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Beef Bourguignon
recipes.description: Classic French beef stew braised in red wine with mushrooms and pearl onions

steps.description: Preheat oven to 325°F. Pat beef dry and season with salt and pepper.
In a Dutch oven, cook bacon until crisp. Remove with slotted spoon.
Brown beef in batches in bacon fat. Remove and set aside.
Sauté carrots and onion until softened. Add garlic and cook 1 minute.
Return beef and bacon to pot. Sprinkle with flour and stir to coat.
Add wine, broth, tomato paste, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to simmer.
Cover and transfer to oven. Cook for 2.5 hours until beef is tender.
Meanwhile, sauté mushrooms and pearl onions in butter until browned.
Add mushrooms and onions to stew during last 30 minutes of cooking.
Remove bay leaf and thyme sprigs before serving.

recipes.name: Falafel
recipes.description: Crispy and flavorful chickpea fritters served in pita with tahini sauce

steps.description: Drain soaked chickpeas well. They should not be cooked.
In food processor, combine chickpeas, onion, parsley, cilantro, and garlic. Pulse until finely ground but not pasty.
Transfer to bowl and add cumin, coriander, salt, pepper, and sesame seeds. Mix well.
Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
Just before frying, add baking powder and mix well.
Shape mixture into small balls or patties, about 1.5 inches in diameter.
Heat 2 inches of oil in a deep pot to 350°F.
Fry falafel in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain on paper towels. Serve in pita with tahini sauce, tomatoes, and cucumbers.

recipes.name: New York Cheesecake
recipes.description: Rich and creamy classic New York-style cheesecake with a graham cracker crust

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Wrap outside of 9-inch springform pan with foil.
Mix graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, and 1/4 cup sugar. Press into pan bottom.
Bake crust for 10 minutes. Cool. Reduce oven to 325°F.
Beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating until creamy.
Add sour cream, vanilla, and lemon juice. Mix well.
Add eggs and yolks one at a time, beating gently after each.
Sift flour over batter and fold in gently.
Pour batter over crust. Place springform in a larger pan with hot water halfway up sides.
Bake for 1 hour 15 minutes until edges are set but center slightly jiggly.
Turn off oven, leave door ajar, and let cheesecake cool for 1 hour.
Refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving.

recipes.name: Chicken Pot Pie
recipes.description: Comforting chicken pot pie with flaky crust and creamy vegetable filling

steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F. Roll out half the dough and line a 9-inch pie plate.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Sauté onion, carrots, and celery until softened.
Sprinkle flour over vegetables and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually whisk in broth and milk. Cook until thickened, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in chicken, peas, thyme, salt, and pepper. Remove from heat.
Pour filling into prepared pie crust.
Roll out remaining dough and place over filling. Crimp edges and cut slits.
Bake for 30-35 minutes until crust is golden and filling is bubbly.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Pork Carnitas
recipes.description: Mexican braised and shredded pork that's crispy on the edges

steps.description: Preheat oven to 300°F. Season pork with salt, pepper, cumin, and oregano.
Heat oil in a Dutch oven over high heat. Brown pork in batches on all sides.
Return all pork to pot. Add onion, garlic, orange juice, lime juice, and bay leaves.
Add enough water to come halfway up the pork.
Bring to simmer, cover, and transfer to oven. Cook for 2 hours until pork is very tender.
Remove pork from liquid and shred with forks.
Spread shredded pork on a baking sheet. Broil for 3-5 minutes until edges are crispy.
Serve in tacos or burritos with salsa, onions, and cilantro.

recipes.name: Tom Yum Soup
recipes.description: Hot and sour Thai soup with shrimp and aromatic herbs

steps.description: Bring stock to boil in a pot. Add lemongrass, lime leaves, galangal, and chilies.
Simmer for 5 minutes to infuse flavors.
Add mushrooms and tomatoes, cook for 2 minutes.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat. Stir in lime juice, fish sauce, and sugar.
Taste and adjust seasoning - should be spicy, sour, and salty.
Garnish with cilantro and serve hot.

recipes.name: Quiche Lorraine
recipes.description: Classic French savory tart with bacon and cheese

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F. Place pie crust in a tart pan and prick bottom with fork.
Line crust with foil and pie weights. Bake for 15 minutes. Remove weights and foil.
Cook bacon until crisp. Remove and drain, leaving 1 tablespoon fat.
Sauté onion in bacon fat until softened, about 3 minutes.
Sprinkle bacon, onion, and cheese over crust.
In a bowl, whisk eggs, cream, milk, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
Pour egg mixture over fillings in crust.
Bake for 30-35 minutes until center is set and top is golden.
Let cool for 10 minutes before slicing.

recipes.name: Lentil Soup
recipes.description: Hearty and nutritious Mediterranean lentil soup

steps.description: Rinse lentils and pick over for debris.
Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté onion, carrots, and celery until softened.
Add garlic and spices, cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add broth, tomatoes, and lentils. Bring to boil, then simmer for 30-35 minutes until lentils are tender.
Stir in spinach and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.
Serve with crusty bread.

recipes.name: Beef Wellington
recipes.description: Elegant beef tenderloin wrapped in mushroom duxelles and puff pastry

steps.description: Season beef with salt and pepper. Sear in hot oil until browned on all sides. Cool and brush with mustard.
For duxelles, cook mushrooms, shallots, and thyme in butter until moisture evaporates. Cool.
Lay plastic wrap and overlap prosciutto slices. Spread duxelles over prosciutto.
Place beef in center and roll tightly using plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out puff pastry. Remove plastic from beef and place in center of pastry.
Wrap pastry around beef, sealing edges with egg wash. Decorate with pastry scraps.
Chill for 30 minutes. Preheat oven to 425°F.
Brush with egg wash and score pastry. Bake for 25-30 minutes for medium-rare.
Rest for 10 minutes before slicing.

recipes.name: Panna Cotta
recipes.description: Creamy Italian dessert with vanilla bean

steps.description: Sprinkle gelatin over cold water in a small bowl. Let stand for 5-10 minutes.
In a saucepan, combine cream, milk, and sugar. If using vanilla bean, split and scrape seeds into cream.
Heat cream mixture over medium heat until hot but not boiling, stirring to dissolve sugar.
Remove from heat. Add softened gelatin and stir until completely dissolved.
If using vanilla extract, stir in now. Strain mixture through fine sieve.
Pour into 4 ramekins or glasses. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours until set.
To serve, dip ramekins in hot water briefly and invert onto plates.
Serve with berry compote or caramel sauce.

recipes.name: Chicken Shawarma
recipes.description: Middle Eastern spiced chicken served with garlic sauce

steps.description: Mix olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and all spices in a bowl.
Add chicken and coat well. Marinate for at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
Preheat grill or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook chicken for 5-7 minutes per side until cooked through and charred.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice thinly.
Warm pita bread and spread with garlic sauce.
Fill with chicken, tomatoes, cucumbers, and pickles.

recipes.name: Gazpacho
recipes.description: Cold Spanish tomato soup perfect for summer

steps.description: Roughly chop tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, and onion.
In a blender, combine vegetables, garlic, soaked bread, olive oil, vinegar, salt, and cumin.
Blend until completely smooth. If too thick, add a little cold water.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve with chopped vegetables and croutons for garnish.

recipes.name: Eggs Benedict
recipes.description: Classic brunch dish with poached eggs and hollandaise sauce

steps.description: For hollandaise, whisk egg yolks and lemon juice in a heatproof bowl over simmering water.
Whisk constantly until yolks thicken, about 3 minutes.
Very slowly drizzle in melted butter while whisking constantly until sauce thickens.
Season with cayenne and salt. Keep warm.
Fill a large skillet with water and vinegar. Bring to simmer.
Crack eggs into small bowls, then gently slide into simmering water.
Poach for 3-4 minutes until whites are set but yolks are runny.
Toast English muffins and warm Canadian bacon in a skillet.
Assemble: muffin, bacon, poached egg, hollandaise sauce.

recipes.name: Tiramisu
recipes.description: Classic Italian coffee-flavored dessert with mascarpone

steps.description: In a bowl, whisk egg yolks and sugar until pale and thick.
Add mascarpone and mix until smooth.
In another bowl, whip cream to stiff peaks. Fold into mascarpone mixture.
Mix coffee and liqueur in a shallow dish.
Quickly dip each ladyfinger in coffee mixture and arrange in an 8x8 dish.
Spread half the mascarpone mixture over ladyfingers.
Repeat layers with remaining ladyfingers and mascarpone.
Dust with cocoa powder and refrigerate for at least 6 hours.
Grate chocolate over top before serving.

recipes.name: Miso Soup
recipes.description: Traditional Japanese soup with tofu and seaweed

steps.description: Rehydrate wakame in water according to package directions. Drain.
Heat dashi in a pot over medium heat. Do not boil.
Place miso in a small bowl. Add a ladle of hot dashi and whisk until smooth.
Pour miso mixture back into pot and stir.
Add tofu and wakame. Heat gently for 1-2 minutes.
Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Fish and Chips
recipes.description: Classic British beer-battered fish with crispy fries

steps.description: Soak potato fries in cold water for 30 minutes. Drain and dry thoroughly.
Heat oil to 325°F. Fry potatoes in batches until tender but not brown, about 4 minutes.
Remove and drain. Increase oil temperature to 375°F.
For batter, whisk flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt. Whisk in beer until smooth.
Pat fish dry and season with salt. Dip in batter, letting excess drip off.
Carefully lower fish into hot oil. Fry until golden brown, about 5-6 minutes.
Drain fish on paper towels. Keep warm in oven.
Return fries to hot oil and fry until golden and crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Season fries with salt and serve with fish, tartar sauce, and lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Ratatouille
recipes.description: Provençal vegetable stew with Mediterranean herbs

steps.description: Salt eggplant and let sit for 30 minutes. Rinse and pat dry.
Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté onion and peppers until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add eggplant, zucchini, and squash. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add tomatoes, herbs, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 30 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Remove bay leaf. Serve warm or at room temperature.

recipes.name: Creme Brulee
recipes.description: Rich vanilla custard with a caramelized sugar top

steps.description: Preheat oven to 325°F. Place 4 ramekins in a baking dish.
Heat cream in a saucepan. Split vanilla bean, scrape seeds into cream, and add pod.
Bring just to simmer, then remove from heat and let steep for 15 minutes. Remove pod.
Whisk egg yolks and sugar until pale. Slowly whisk in warm cream.
Strain mixture and divide among ramekins.
Pour hot water into baking dish halfway up ramekins.
Bake for 35-40 minutes until edges are set but center slightly jiggly.
Cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
Sprinkle brown sugar on top and caramelize with torch until bubbly.

recipes.name: Chana Masala
recipes.description: Spicy and tangy Indian chickpea curry

steps.description: Heat oil in a pot over medium heat. Add cumin seeds until they sizzle.
Add onion and cook until golden brown, about 8 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute.
Add coriander, cumin, turmeric, and cayenne. Cook for 30 seconds.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
Add chickpeas with their liquid and 1/2 cup water. Simmer for 15 minutes.
Mash some chickpeas to thicken the sauce.
Stir in garam masala and lemon juice. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Paella
recipes.description: Spanish saffron rice dish with seafood and chicken

steps.description: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Heat oil in paella pan over medium-high heat.
Brown chicken on both sides, about 5 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.
In same pan, sauté onion and pepper until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute. Add tomatoes and cook until reduced.
Stir in paprika and rice, coating well. Add saffron to broth and pour into pan.
Arrange chicken in pan. Bring to boil, then simmer for 15 minutes.
Arrange shrimp and mussels in rice. Cook for 10 more minutes.
Sprinkle peas on top. Cook until rice is done and liquid absorbed.
Remove from heat, cover with foil, and rest for 5 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Baklava
recipes.description: Sweet Middle Eastern pastry with nuts and honey syrup

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix nuts, 1/4 cup sugar, and cinnamon.
Brush a 9x13 pan with butter. Layer 8 sheets of phyllo, brushing each with butter.
Sprinkle with 1/3 of nut mixture. Add 2 more buttered phyllo sheets.
Repeat layers twice more, ending with 8 buttered phyllo sheets on top.
Cut into diamond shapes with a sharp knife.
Bake for 40-45 minutes until golden brown.
Meanwhile, make syrup: boil water and 1 cup sugar until dissolved.
Add honey and lemon juice, simmer for 10 minutes. Cool slightly.
Pour warm syrup over hot baklava. Cool completely before serving.

recipes.name: Goulash
recipes.description: Hungarian beef stew with paprika and caraway

steps.description: Heat lard in a large pot over medium heat. Cook onions until golden, about 10 minutes.
Add beef and brown on all sides.
Add bell pepper, tomatoes, and garlic. Cook for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in paprika (to prevent burning).
Add caraway seeds and broth. Bring to boil, then simmer for 1.5 hours.
Add potatoes and carrots. Continue cooking until vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
Season with salt and serve with bread or egg noodles.

recipes.name: Samosa
recipes.description: Crispy Indian pastry filled with spiced potatoes and peas

steps.description: Mix flour, salt, and oil. Gradually add water to form a stiff dough. Rest for 30 minutes.
For filling, heat oil in pan. Add cumin seeds until they sizzle.
Add onion, ginger, chili and cook until soft. Add spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add peas and mashed potatoes. Cook for 2 minutes. Stir in lemon juice and cilantro. Cool.
Divide dough into 6 balls. Roll each into a circle and cut in half.
Form each half into a cone, fill with potato mixture, and seal edges with water.
Heat oil to 350°F. Fry samosas until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain on paper towels and serve with chutney.

recipes.name: Cioppino
recipes.description: San Francisco-style seafood stew with tomatoes and wine

steps.description: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté onion and fennel until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes, stock, wine, bay leaf, and thyme. Simmer for 30 minutes.
Add clams and mussels. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
Add fish, shrimp, and scallops. Cook until seafood is done, about 5 minutes.
Discard any unopened shellfish. Garnish with parsley.
Serve with crusty bread for sopping up the broth.

recipes.name: Key Lime Pie
recipes.description: Tangy and sweet Florida Keys specialty with graham cracker crust

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix crumbs, sugar, and butter. Press into 9-inch pie plate.
Bake crust for 10 minutes. Cool slightly. Reduce oven to 325°F.
Whisk condensed milk, egg yolks, lime juice, and zest until smooth.
Pour filling into crust. Bake for 15 minutes until set.
Cool completely, then refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
Whip cream with powdered sugar until stiff peaks form.
Spread or pipe whipped cream over chilled pie.

recipes.name: Coq au Vin
recipes.description: Classic French chicken braised with wine, mushrooms, and bacon

steps.description: Season chicken with salt and pepper. In a Dutch oven, cook bacon until crisp. Remove with slotted spoon.
Brown chicken in bacon fat on all sides, about 8 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add mushrooms and pearl onions to pot. Cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove with bacon.
Add carrots and garlic, cook for 2 minutes. Sprinkle with flour and stir for 1 minute.
Add wine, broth, tomato paste, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to simmer.
Return chicken to pot. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes until chicken is tender.
Return bacon, mushrooms, and onions to pot. Cook for 10 more minutes.
Remove chicken and vegetables. Boil sauce to thicken if desired. Swirl in butter.
Return everything to pot and serve with mashed potatoes.

recipes.name: Hummus
recipes.description: Creamy Middle Eastern chickpea dip with tahini and lemon

steps.description: Drain chickpeas, reserving liquid. Peel skins if desired for smoother texture.
In food processor, combine chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, and salt.
Process until smooth, scraping down sides as needed.
With machine running, add ice water slowly until creamy.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Add reserved chickpea liquid if too thick.
Transfer to bowl, make a well with spoon, and drizzle with olive oil.

recipes.name: Osso Buco
recipes.description: Italian braised veal shanks with gremolata

steps.description: Season veal with salt and pepper. Dredge in flour.
Heat oil in Dutch oven. Brown shanks on all sides, about 8 minutes. Remove.
Sauté onion, carrot, and celery until softened, about 5 minutes. Add garlic.
Add wine and scrape up brown bits. Reduce by half.
Add broth and tomatoes. Return shanks to pot. Bring to simmer.
Cover and braise for 1.5-2 hours until meat is very tender.
Remove shanks. Boil sauce to thicken if desired.
Mix lemon zest, parsley, and minced garlic for gremolata.
Serve shanks with sauce and gremolata on top.

recipes.name: Spanakopita
recipes.description: Greek spinach and feta pie in flaky phyllo pastry

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F. Wilt spinach in a hot pan, squeeze out excess water, and chop.
Sauté onion until soft. Combine with spinach, cheeses, herbs, eggs, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
Brush a 9x13 pan with butter. Layer 8 sheets of phyllo, brushing each with butter.
Spread spinach mixture evenly over phyllo.
Top with 8 more buttered phyllo sheets, brushing each layer.
Score top layers into squares. Bake for 40-45 minutes until golden.
Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting and serving.

recipes.name: Bouillabaisse
recipes.description: Provençal fish stew with saffron and rouille

steps.description: Heat oil in large pot. Sauté onion, leek, and fennel until softened, about 8 minutes.
Add garlic, cook for 1 minute. Add tomatoes, orange zest, saffron, bay leaf, and thyme.
Add water to cover (about 6 cups). Simmer for 30 minutes.
Strain broth, pressing on vegetables. Return broth to pot.
Bring broth to simmer. Add firm fish first, cook for 5 minutes.
Add delicate fish, mussels, and shrimp. Cook until mussels open and fish is done.
Serve with rouille (garlic-mayonnaise) and crusty bread.

recipes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
recipes.description: Bell peppers filled with seasoned ground meat and rice

steps.description: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cut tops off peppers and remove seeds.
Blanch peppers in boiling water for 3 minutes. Drain.
Brown beef and onion in skillet. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Drain fat.
Stir in rice, half the tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, Worcestershire, and seasoning.
Stuff peppers with meat mixture. Place in baking dish.
Pour remaining tomato sauce over peppers.
Cover and bake for 30 minutes. Uncover, top with cheese, bake 10 more minutes.

recipes.name: Tzatziki
recipes.description: Greek yogurt and cucumber sauce with garlic and dill

steps.description: Grate cucumber and toss with salt. Place in strainer for 30 minutes to drain.
Press cucumber to remove excess water.
Mix yogurt, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, and dill.
Stir in drained cucumber.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to blend flavors.
Serve with pita bread or as sauce for gyros.

recipes.name: Beef Rendang
recipes.description: Slow-cooked Indonesian coconut beef curry

steps.description: Make spice paste by blending shallots, garlic, ginger, galangal, chilies, and turmeric.
Toast coriander and cumin in dry pan until fragrant, add to paste.
In a large pot, cook spice paste until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Add beef and stir to coat. Cook until beef browns.
Add coconut milk, lemongrass, lime leaves, cinnamon, and sugar.
Bring to simmer, then cook on low heat for 2.5-3 hours, stirring occasionally.
Continue cooking until liquid evaporates and beef is coated in dark, dry curry.
Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Croque Monsieur
recipes.description: Classic French ham and cheese sandwich with béchamel

steps.description: Make béchamel: melt butter, add flour, cook for 1 minute. Whisk in milk until thick. Season with nutmeg.
Preheat broiler. Butter bread slices on one side.
Place 2 slices butter-side down in a skillet. Top with ham and half the cheese.
Top with remaining bread, butter-side up. Cook until golden, about 3 minutes per side.
Place sandwiches on baking sheet. Spread béchamel on top, sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Broil until bubbly and golden, about 2-3 minutes.

recipes.name: Moussaka
recipes.description: Greek eggplant casserole with spiced meat and béchamel

steps.description: Slice eggplants, salt, and let sit for 30 minutes. Rinse and pat dry. Brush with oil and broil until browned.
Brown meat with onion. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Add wine, reduce. Add tomatoes, paste, and spices. Simmer 30 minutes.
Make béchamel: melt butter, add flour, cook 1 minute. Whisk in milk until thick. Cool slightly, beat in eggs and Parmesan.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Layer eggplant in baking dish, then meat sauce. Repeat.
Pour béchamel over top. Bake for 45-50 minutes until golden.
Let rest for 15 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Pulled Pork
recipes.description: Slow-cooked barbecue pork shoulder with smoky sauce

steps.description: Mix brown sugar and all spices. Rub all over pork.
Place pork in slow cooker. Add vinegar and broth around pork.
Cook on low for 8 hours until pork is very tender.
Remove pork, let cool slightly. Shred with two forks.
Skim fat from cooking liquid. Mix some liquid with shredded pork.
Toss with barbecue sauce and serve on buns with coleslaw.

recipes.name: Bibimbap
recipes.description: Korean mixed rice bowl with vegetables and gochujang

steps.description: Marinate beef in 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp sesame oil, and garlic.
Blanch spinach and bean sprouts separately. Season with salt and sesame oil.
Sauté carrot and zucchini separately with salt until tender.
Sauté mushrooms with soy sauce. Cook beef in same pan.
Fry eggs sunny-side up.
Divide rice among bowls. Arrange vegetables and beef on top.
Top with egg, sesame seeds, and gochujang. Mix before eating.

recipes.name: Clam Chowder
recipes.description: Creamy New England clam chowder with potatoes and bacon

steps.description: Cook bacon in large pot until crisp. Remove with slotted spoon.
Sauté onion and celery in bacon fat until softened, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over vegetables and cook for 1 minute, stirring.
Gradually whisk in clam juice, milk, and potatoes.
Add thyme and bay leaf. Simmer until potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.
Stir in clams and cream. Heat through but do not boil.
Remove bay leaf. Garnish with bacon and serve with oyster crackers.

recipes.name: Fajitas
recipes.description: Sizzling grilled steak and peppers with tortillas

steps.description: Mix lime juice, oil, garlic, and spices. Marinate steak for at least 2 hours.
Remove steak from marinade. Grill or pan-sear to desired doneness.
Let steak rest for 10 minutes, then slice thinly against the grain.
Sauté peppers and onions in same pan until charred and softened.
Warm tortillas. Serve with steak, vegetables, guacamole, and salsa.

recipes.name: Cassoulet
recipes.description: Rich French bean and meat casserole

steps.description: Soak beans overnight. Drain and simmer in fresh water for 1 hour. Drain.
Brown pork, sausage, and bacon. Remove meat. Sauté onion and carrots until soft.
Add garlic and tomato paste, cook 1 minute. Add broth and beans.
Layer beans, meats in casserole dish. Pour liquid over.
Top with breadcrumbs. Bake at 325°F for 1.5 hours.
Break crust and add more broth if dry. Continue baking until crusty.

recipes.name: Crab Cakes
recipes.description: Maryland-style crab cakes with minimal filler

steps.description: Pick through crab meat to remove any shells.
In a bowl, mix mayo, egg, mustard, Worcestershire, Old Bay, parsley, and lemon juice.
Gently fold in crab meat and 1/4 cup breadcrumbs.
Form into 8 patties. Coat with remaining breadcrumbs.
Chill for 30 minutes. Heat butter in skillet over medium heat.
Cook crab cakes until golden, about 4 minutes per side.
Serve with remoulade or tartar sauce.

recipes.name: Tortilla Española
recipes.description: Spanish potato and onion omelet

steps.description: Peel potatoes and slice thinly. Slice onion thinly.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add potatoes and onion.
Cook slowly, turning occasionally, until potatoes are tender but not brown, about 20 minutes.
Drain potatoes and onion, reserving oil. Beat eggs with salt in large bowl.
Fold potatoes and onion into eggs. Let sit for 10 minutes.
Heat 2 tbsp reserved oil in skillet. Add egg mixture and cook over medium heat.
When edges are set but center still runny, place plate over skillet and flip.
Slide tortilla back in pan and cook other side for 3-4 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

recipes.name: Bangers and Mash
recipes.description: British sausages with mashed potatoes and onion gravy

steps.description: Boil potatoes until tender. Drain and mash with butter and milk. Season.
Brown sausages in skillet over medium heat, about 10 minutes. Remove.
In same skillet, cook onions slowly until caramelized, about 15 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over onions, cook for 1 minute. Stir in broth and Worcestershire.
Return sausages to pan and simmer until sauce thickens.
Serve sausages and gravy over mashed potatoes.

recipes.name: Shakshuka
recipes.description: North African eggs poached in spicy tomato sauce

steps.description: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté onion and pepper until soft.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute. Add spices and tomato paste, cook 1 minute.
Add crushed tomatoes. Simmer for 15 minutes until thickened.
Make wells in sauce and crack eggs into them.
Cover and cook until eggs are set, about 5-8 minutes.
Sprinkle with feta and cilantro. Serve with crusty bread.

recipes.name: Ceviche
recipes.description: Peruvian raw fish cured in citrus juices

steps.description: Combine fish, lime juice, and lemon juice in a non-reactive bowl.
Cover and refrigerate for 15-20 minutes until fish turns opaque.
Drain most of the juice. Add onion, chili, cilantro, and salt.
Toss gently and let sit for 5 minutes.
Serve with corn and sweet potato slices.

recipes.name: Peking Duck
recipes.description: Crispy Chinese duck with pancakes and hoisin sauce

steps.description: Pour boiling water over duck to tighten skin. Pat dry.
Mix honey, soy sauce, vinegar, and five-spice. Brush over duck.
Place duck on rack in refrigerator uncovered overnight to dry skin.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Roast duck for 1.5 hours until skin is crispy.
Let rest for 15 minutes. Carve skin and meat.
Serve with pancakes, hoisin, cucumber, and green onions.

recipes.name: Gnocchi
recipes.description: Soft Italian potato dumplings with sage butter

steps.description: Boil potatoes until tender. Drain and rice while hot.
Spread on surface to cool. Make well, add egg, salt, and gradually add flour.
Knead gently until dough forms. Roll into ropes and cut 1-inch pieces.
Roll over fork tines if desired. Cook in boiling salted water until they float, about 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, melt butter with sage until bubbling.
Drain gnocchi and toss with sage butter and Parmesan.

recipes.name: Jambalaya
recipes.description: Spicy Louisiana rice dish with chicken, sausage, and shrimp

steps.description: Brown chicken in oil, remove. Brown sausage, remove.
Sauté onion, pepper, celery until soft. Add garlic.
Add rice and stir to coat. Add tomatoes, broth, seasoning, bay leaf.
Return chicken and sausage to pot. Bring to boil, then simmer covered for 20 minutes.
Add shrimp and cook 5 more minutes until rice is done.
Remove bay leaf and serve.

recipes.name: Bruschetta
recipes.description: Toasted bread topped with fresh tomatoes and basil

steps.description: Mix tomatoes, basil, 1 minced garlic clove, olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper. Let sit.
Toast bread slices until golden. Rub with remaining garlic clove.
Top bread with tomato mixture. Drizzle with more olive oil if desired.
Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Kung Pao Chicken
recipes.description: Spicy Sichuan stir-fry with peanuts and vegetables

steps.description: Mix soy sauce, vinegar, hoisin, sugar, cornstarch, and 2 tbsp water. Set aside.
Heat oil in wok. Toast peppercorns and chilies until fragrant.
Add chicken and stir-fry until white, about 3 minutes.
Add bell pepper and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir sauce and add to wok. Cook until thickened.
Add peanuts and green onions. Toss and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Pho
recipes.description: Vietnamese beef noodle soup with aromatic broth

steps.description: Parboil beef bones in boiling water for 5 minutes. Drain and rinse bones.
Char onion and ginger under broiler or over gas flame until blackened.
In large pot, cover bones with 5 quarts water. Bring to boil, then simmer.
Add charred onion, ginger, and all spices tied in cheesecloth. Simmer for 3 hours, skimming occasionally.
Remove bones and spice bag. Strain broth. Season with fish sauce, sugar, and salt.
Cook rice noodles according to package directions.
Place noodles in bowls. Top with raw beef slices.
Ladle boiling broth over beef to cook it. Serve with bean sprouts, herbs, lime, and jalapeño.

recipes.name: Chicken Wings (Buffalo)
recipes.description: Crispy fried chicken wings with spicy Buffalo sauce

steps.description: Pat wings dry. Mix flour with garlic powder, paprika, cayenne, salt, and pepper.
Dredge wings in seasoned flour, shaking off excess.
Heat oil to 375°F in deep pot. Fry wings in batches until golden and cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Drain on paper towels.
In small saucepan, melt butter with hot sauce and honey.
Toss wings in sauce until coated. Serve with celery and blue cheese dressing.

recipes.name: Chiles Rellenos
recipes.description: Roasted poblano peppers stuffed with cheese, battered and fried

steps.description: Roast poblanos over gas flame or under broiler until skin is blackened. Place in bowl, cover with plastic wrap to steam.
Peel skin from peppers. Make a small slit lengthwise and carefully remove seeds, keeping stem intact.
Stuff peppers with cheese strips. Close slit with toothpicks.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Beat yolks with salt, then fold into whites.
Dust peppers with flour, then dip in egg batter.
Heat oil in skillet. Fry peppers until golden on all sides, about 4-5 minutes.
Serve with warm tomato sauce.

recipes.name: Cottage Pie
recipes.description: British ground beef pie with mashed potato topping

steps.description: Boil potatoes until tender. Mash with butter, milk, and egg yolk. Season.
Brown ground beef in skillet. Remove with slotted spoon.
Sauté onion, carrots, celery until soft. Add garlic and tomato paste, cook 1 minute.
Return beef to pan. Add broth and Worcestershire. Simmer 15 minutes.
Stir in peas. Transfer to baking dish.
Top with mashed potatoes, create peaks with fork.
Bake at 400°F for 25-30 minutes until bubbly and golden.

recipes.name: Falooda
recipes.description: Indian rose-flavored dessert drink with vermicelli and basil seeds

steps.description: Soak basil seeds in water for 15 minutes until they swell.
Cook vermicelli according to package directions. Drain and chill.
In tall glasses, layer cooked vermicelli, soaked basil seeds, and rose syrup.
Pour chilled milk over. Top with ice cream scoop.
Garnish with chopped nuts. Serve with long spoon.

recipes.name: Empanadas
recipes.description: Argentinian stuffed pastries with beef filling

steps.description: Brown beef with onion and pepper. Drain fat.
Add cumin, paprika, broth. Simmer until liquid evaporates. Cool.
Stir in chopped egg, olives, and raisins.
Place filling on dough discs. Brush edges with water, fold over, and crimp.
Place on baking sheet. Brush with beaten egg.
Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes until golden.

recipes.name: Gumbo
recipes.description: Louisiana stew with okra, sausage, and seafood

steps.description: Make roux: cook flour and oil in heavy pot over medium heat, stirring constantly, until dark brown (color of chocolate), about 20 minutes.
Add onion, pepper, celery to roux. Cook until softened.
Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Gradually stir in broth.
Add chicken, sausage, tomatoes, bay leaf, and seasoning. Simmer for 45 minutes.
Add okra and shrimp. Cook 15 more minutes.
Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Baklava
recipes.description: Sweet Middle Eastern pastry with nuts and honey syrup

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix nuts, 1/4 cup sugar, and cinnamon.
Brush a 9x13 pan with butter. Layer 8 sheets of phyllo, brushing each with butter.
Sprinkle with 1/3 of nut mixture. Add 2 more buttered phyllo sheets.
Repeat layers twice more, ending with 8 buttered phyllo sheets on top.
Cut into diamond shapes with a sharp knife.
Bake for 40-45 minutes until golden brown.
Meanwhile, make syrup: boil water and 1 cup sugar until dissolved.
Add honey and lemon juice, simmer for 10 minutes. Cool slightly.
Pour warm syrup over hot baklava. Cool completely before serving.

recipes.name: Miso Ramen
recipes.description: Japanese noodle soup with miso broth and toppings

steps.description: Heat sesame oil in pot. Sauté garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add broth and bring to simmer. Whisk in miso paste until dissolved.
Cook ramen noodles according to package directions. Drain.
Divide noodles among bowls. Ladle hot broth over.
Top with sliced pork, halved eggs, bamboo shoots, corn, nori, and green onions.

recipes.name: Tandoori Chicken
recipes.description: Indian spiced yogurt-marinated chicken, traditionally cooked in clay oven

steps.description: Score chicken pieces. Mix all ingredients except oil to make marinade.
Coat chicken with marinade. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.
Preheat oven to 400°F. Place chicken on baking sheet, drizzle with oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until cooked through and slightly charred.
Alternatively, grill over high heat for authentic char.
Serve with mint chutney and onions.

recipes.name: Crepes
recipes.description: Thin French pancakes for sweet or savory fillings

steps.description: Whisk all ingredients until smooth. Let batter rest for 30 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Lightly grease.
Pour about 1/4 cup batter, swirling to cover bottom.
Cook until edges lift and bottom is lightly browned, about 1 minute.
Flip and cook other side for 30 seconds.
Stack crepes with parchment between. Serve with Nutella, fruit, or savory fillings.

recipes.name: Jerk Chicken
recipes.description: Spicy Jamaican grilled chicken with jerk seasoning

steps.description: Blend all ingredients except chicken into a paste.
Score chicken and coat with jerk paste. Marinate overnight.
Preheat grill to medium-high. Grill chicken, skin-side down, for 6-8 minutes.
Flip and continue grilling until cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Rest for 5 minutes before serving with rice and peas.

recipes.name: Cannoli
recipes.description: Italian fried pastry tubes filled with sweet ricotta cream

steps.description: Mix flour, sugar, cocoa, cinnamon, salt. Cut in butter. Add egg yolk and wine to form dough.
Wrap and rest for 30 minutes. Roll dough thin, cut into circles.
Wrap around cannoli tubes, sealing edges with egg white.
Fry in 375°F oil until golden, about 2 minutes. Drain and cool.
Drain ricotta overnight. Mix with powdered sugar and vanilla.
Fill shells just before serving. Dip ends in chocolate chips and pistachios.

recipes.name: Couscous with Vegetables
recipes.description: Moroccan steamed semolina with spiced vegetable stew

steps.description: Heat oil in pot. Sauté onion until soft. Add carrots, cook 5 minutes.
Add spices, cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes, chickpeas, raisins, and 1 cup water.
Simmer for 20 minutes. Add zucchini and cook 10 more minutes.
Bring broth to boil. Stir in couscous, cover, remove from heat. Let sit 5 minutes.
Fluff couscous with fork. Serve with vegetable stew on top.

recipes.name: Gyoza
recipes.description: Japanese pan-fried dumplings with pork and cabbage

steps.description: Salt cabbage and let sit 10 minutes. Squeeze out water.
Mix pork, cabbage, chives, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and pepper.
Place teaspoon filling on wrapper. Brush edges with water, fold and pleat to seal.
Heat oil in skillet over medium heat. Place gyoza flat side down.
Cook until bottoms are golden, about 2 minutes.
Add 1/4 cup water, cover, and steam until water evaporates, about 5 minutes.
Uncover and cook until bottoms are crispy again. Serve with dipping sauce.

recipes.name: Poutine
recipes.description: Canadian fries with cheese curds and gravy

steps.description: Cut potatoes into fries. Soak in cold water for 30 minutes. Drain and dry.
Heat oil to 325°F. Fry potatoes until tender but not brown, about 4 minutes. Drain.
Increase oil temperature to 375°F. Fry again until golden and crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
For gravy, melt butter, whisk in flour, cook 1 minute. Gradually whisk in broth.
Simmer until thickened. Add Worcestershire, season.
Place hot fries on plate, top with cheese curds, and pour hot gravy over.

recipes.name: Biryani
recipes.description: Aromatic Indian rice dish with spiced meat and saffron

steps.description: Marinate chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, turmeric, chili powder, and salt for 1 hour.
Soak saffron in warm milk. Soak rice for 30 minutes.
Fry sliced onions until golden brown and crispy. Remove half for garnish.
In same pan, add whole spices, then marinated chicken. Cook until chicken is half done.
Parboil rice with salt until 70% cooked. Drain.
Layer rice over chicken in heavy pot. Sprinkle fried onions, mint, cilantro, and saffron milk.
Cover tightly and cook on low heat for 20-25 minutes until rice is fully cooked.
Gently mix before serving. Serve with raita.

recipes.name: Focaccia
recipes.description: Italian flatbread with olive oil and rosemary

steps.description: Mix flour, yeast, salt, and sugar. Add warm water and 1/4 cup olive oil.
Knead until smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes. Place in oiled bowl, cover, rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
Oil a baking sheet. Press dough into rectangle. Cover and rise 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 425°F. Dimple dough with fingers.
Drizzle with remaining olive oil. Sprinkle with rosemary and sea salt.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown. Cool on wire rack.

recipes.name: Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipes.description: Chicken breast stuffed with ham and Swiss cheese

steps.description: Pound chicken breasts thin. Season with salt and pepper.
Place ham and cheese on each breast. Roll up tightly, tucking in sides.
Secure with toothpicks. Dredge in flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs.
Heat butter in oven-safe skillet. Brown chicken on all sides.
Transfer to 375°F oven and bake for 15-20 minutes until cooked through.
Let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.

recipes.name: Baba Ghanoush
recipes.description: Smoky eggplant dip from the Middle East

steps.description: Pierce eggplants with fork. Roast over gas flame, under broiler, or on grill until skin is charred and flesh is soft, about 20-30 minutes.
Let cool slightly. Scoop out flesh into colander, drain excess liquid for 10 minutes.
In food processor, combine eggplant, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, and salt.
Pulse until smooth but still with some texture.
Transfer to bowl, make well, drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with parsley.
Serve with pita bread.

recipes.name: Wiener Schnitzel
recipes.description: Austrian breaded veal cutlet

steps.description: Pound cutlets thin. Season with salt.
Set up breading station: flour, beaten eggs, breadcrumbs.
Dredge cutlets in flour, then egg, then breadcrumbs, pressing gently.
Heat oil in large skillet until shimmering. Fry cutlets until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Kibbeh
recipes.description: Lebanese bulgur wheat and ground meat croquettes

steps.description: Soak bulgur in cold water for 15 minutes. Squeeze out excess water.
Mix bulgur with 1 lb beef, grated onion, spices. Process in food processor until paste-like.
For filling, sauté diced onion and 1/4 lb beef. Add pine nuts.
Form bulgur mixture into balls. Make hole, fill with meat mixture, seal into oval shape.
Heat oil and fry kibbeh until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Drain and serve with yogurt sauce.

recipes.name: Chimichanga
recipes.description: Deep-fried burrito with meat and cheese

steps.description: Warm tortillas to make pliable.
Spread beans down center of each tortilla. Top with chicken and cheese.
Fold sides in and roll tightly. Secure with toothpicks.
Heat oil to 375°F. Fry burritos seam-side down until golden, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels. Top with sour cream and salsa.

recipes.name: Moules Marinières
recipes.description: French mussels steamed in white wine and garlic

steps.description: Scrub and debeard mussels. Discard any that are open.
In large pot, melt butter. Cook shallots until soft. Add garlic, cook 1 minute.
Add wine and bring to boil. Add mussels, cover, and cook until they open, about 5-6 minutes.
Discard any unopened mussels. Stir in parsley.
Serve in bowls with broth and crusty bread.

recipes.name: Scones
recipes.description: British buttermilk scones perfect for tea time

steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F. Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, salt.
Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Whisk buttermilk, egg, vanilla. Add to flour mixture, stir until just combined.
Turn onto floured surface, knead gently. Pat to 3/4-inch thickness.
Cut into rounds with biscuit cutter. Place on baking sheet.
Brush tops with milk. Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden.
Serve warm with clotted cream and jam.

recipes.name: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani)
recipes.description: Creamy and mildly spiced North Indian curry with tender chicken pieces in a tomato-butter sauce

steps.description: Marinate chicken with ginger-garlic paste, lemon juice, red chili powder, and salt for 30 minutes.
In a skillet, cook chicken until lightly browned (can grill or pan-fry). Set aside.
In a large pan, melt 2 tablespoons butter. Sauté onion until soft and golden.
Add tomato purée, green chili, and cook until tomatoes are well-cooked and oil separates.
Add garam masala, cumin, coriander powder, and kasuri methi. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add cooked chicken and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in cream, remaining butter, and honey. Simmer for 5 more minutes.
Garnish with more cream and serve with naan or rice.

recipes.name: Idli
recipes.description: Soft and fluffy steamed rice-lentil cakes, a staple South Indian breakfast

steps.description: Wash rice and urad dal separately. Soak rice with fenugreek seeds for 4-6 hours. Soak urad dal for 4-6 hours.
Drain urad dal and grind to a smooth, fluffy paste using minimal water. Set aside.
Drain rice and grind to a slightly coarse paste. Mix with urad dal paste.
Add salt and mix well. Cover and ferment in a warm place for 8-12 hours until batter rises and becomes airy.
Grease idli moulds and pour batter into each mould.
Steam in idli steamer for 10-12 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
Let cool slightly, remove with spoon, and serve with sambar and coconut chutney.

recipes.name: Chicken Biryani
recipes.description: Aromatic layered rice dish with spiced chicken, saffron, and fried onions

ingredients.name: whole spices: bay leaf, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, cumin

steps.description: Marinate chicken with yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, biryani masala, turmeric, chili powder, and salt for 1-2 hours.
Soak saffron in warm milk. Soak rice for 30 minutes.
Fry sliced onions in oil until golden brown and crisp. Remove half for garnish.
In same pan, add whole spices and marinated chicken. Cook until chicken is half done.
Boil rice with whole spices and salt until 70% cooked. Drain.
In a heavy pot, layer half the rice, then chicken, mint, coriander, fried onions. Top with remaining rice.
Pour saffron milk and ghee over rice. Cover tightly with foil and lid.
Cook on low heat (dum) for 20-25 minutes. Let rest for 10 minutes before gently mixing.

recipes.name: Chana Masala
recipes.description: Tangy and spicy chickpea curry from North India

steps.description: Heat oil in a pan. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter.
Add onion and sauté until golden brown.
Add ginger-garlic paste and green chili, cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato purée and cook until oil separates, about 5 minutes.
Add coriander, cumin, turmeric, chili powder. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add chickpeas with some water. Mash a few chickpeas to thicken gravy.
Simmer for 10-15 minutes. Add amchur, garam masala, and tamarind.
Garnish with coriander and serve with bhatura or rice.

recipes.name: Palak Paneer
recipes.description: Creamy spinach curry with soft Indian cottage cheese cubes

steps.description: Blanch spinach in boiling water for 2 minutes. Transfer to ice bath.
Blend spinach with green chili to a smooth purée. Set aside.
Heat butter in a pan. Add cumin seeds, then onion, and sauté until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook for 1 minute. Add tomato and cook until soft.
Add turmeric, chili powder, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Add spinach purée and simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Add paneer cubes and garam masala. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in cream and serve hot with naan or rice.

recipes.name: Masala Dosa
recipes.description: Crispy rice crepe filled with spiced potato filling

steps.description: For filling: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, cumin, dals, and curry leaves.
Add onions, green chilies, ginger, and sauté until soft.
Add turmeric and mashed potatoes. Mix well, season with salt. Set aside.
Heat a non-stick tawa or griddle. Pour a ladle of dosa batter and spread in circular motion.
Drizzle oil around edges. Cook until golden and crisp.
Place potato filling on one half, fold over, and serve with coconut chutney and sambar.

recipes.name: Rogan Josh
recipes.description: Kashmiri lamb curry with deep red color from Kashmiri chilies

steps.description: Heat oil in heavy pot. Brown lamb in batches. Remove and set aside.
In same pot, add whole spices and onion. Cook until onion is golden.
Add ginger and garlic paste, cook for 2 minutes.
Add chili, turmeric, coriander, fennel powders. Cook for 1 minute.
Return lamb to pot. Add yogurt gradually, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups water, bring to boil, then simmer covered for 1 hour until lamb is tender.
Stir in garam masala and simmer uncovered to thicken gravy.
Serve hot with rice or naan.

recipes.name: Dal Makhani
recipes.description: Creamy black lentils cooked overnight with butter and cream

steps.description: Soak urad dal and rajma overnight. Pressure cook with salt until soft (about 6-7 whistles).
Heat butter and oil in a pan. Sauté onion until golden.
Add ginger-garlic paste, cook for 1 minute. Add tomato purée and cook until oil separates.
Add chili, cumin, coriander powders. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add cooked dal with some water. Simmer on low heat for 30 minutes, mashing some dal.
Add garam masala and cream. Simmer for 5 more minutes.
Finish with a pat of butter and serve with naan or rice.

recipes.name: Samosas
recipes.description: Crispy fried pastries filled with spiced potatoes and peas

steps.description: Mix flour, ajwain, salt, and oil. Add water gradually to form stiff dough. Rest 30 minutes.
Heat oil, add cumin seeds, then green chili and ginger. Add peas and cook briefly.
Add mashed potatoes and all spices. Cook for 2 minutes. Add coriander leaves. Cool.
Divide dough into 6 balls. Roll each into circle, cut in half.
Form cone with each half, fill with potato mixture, seal edges with water.
Heat oil to 350°F. Fry samosas until golden brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Drain and serve with mint chutney and tamarind chutney.

recipes.name: Gulab Jamun
recipes.description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in rose-scented sugar syrup

steps.description: Mix milk powder, flour, and baking soda. Add ghee and rub in.
Add milk gradually to form soft dough. Do not overmix. Rest for 10 minutes.
Make sugar syrup: boil sugar and water until sticky (1 thread consistency). Add cardamom and rose water.
Divide dough into small smooth balls (no cracks).
Heat oil to 300°F (low-medium heat). Fry balls slowly until golden brown.
Drain and add to warm sugar syrup. Soak for at least 2 hours before serving.

recipes.name: Pav Bhaji
recipes.description: Mumbai street food: buttery bread rolls served with spiced mixed vegetable mash

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables (potato, cauliflower, peas, carrot, bell pepper)

steps.description: Boil vegetables until soft. Drain and mash coarsely.
Heat butter in a pan. Sauté half the onion until soft. Add ginger-garlic and green chili.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft. Add pav bhaji masala, chili, turmeric.
Add mashed vegetables and mix. Add water to adjust consistency. Simmer for 10 minutes.
Garnish with coriander and more butter.
Toast pav with butter on a griddle until golden.
Serve bhaji with pav, remaining raw onion, and lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Raita
recipes.description: Yogurt side dish with cucumber or mint, perfect with biryani and spicy curries

steps.description: Squeeze excess water from grated cucumber.
Whisk yogurt until smooth.
Add cucumber, cumin, salts, mint, and coriander. Mix well.
Chill before serving.

recipes.name: Aloo Gobi
recipes.description: Dry potato and cauliflower curry with North Indian spices

steps.description: Heat oil in a pan. Add cumin seeds.
Add onion and sauté until translucent. Add ginger and green chili.
Add potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add cauliflower and all powdered spices except garam masala and amchur.
Cover and cook on low heat until vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add garam masala, amchur, and coriander. Mix gently.
Serve hot with roti.

recipes.name: Pani Puri
recipes.description: Hollow crispy puris filled with spiced potato and tangy mint-coriander water

steps.description: For pani: blend mint, coriander, green chilies, ginger with water until smooth.
Strain, then add tamarind, lemon juice, black salt, regular salt, cumin powder. Chill.
Mix mashed potatoes with chickpeas, chaat masala, chili powder. Set aside.
Make a small hole in each puri.
Stuff with potato mixture, dip in pani, and eat immediately.

recipes.name: Dal Tadka
recipes.description: Yellow lentils tempered with ghee, cumin, garlic, and red chilies

steps.description: Wash dal thoroughly. Pressure cook with turmeric and 2 cups water until soft (about 4-5 whistles).
Mash dal slightly. Add water to adjust consistency.
Heat ghee in small pan. Add cumin seeds, then garlic slices, and dried red chili.
Add onion and sauté until golden. Add tomato and green chili, cook until soft.
Add red chili and coriander powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Pour this tadka over dal. Add garam masala and simmer for 5 minutes.
Garnish with coriander and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Chole Bhature
recipes.description: Spicy chickpea curry served with deep-fried puffy bread

steps.description: For chole: Heat oil, add cumin, then onion, cook until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste.
Add tomato purée and cook until oil separates. Add chole masala, coriander powder.
Add chickpeas with some water. Add tea bag for color. Simmer for 20 minutes.
Remove tea bag. Add amchur and garam masala. Garnish with coriander.
For bhature: Mix flours, yogurt, baking powder, soda, sugar, salt. Add water to make soft dough. Rest 2 hours.
Divide dough, roll into rounds, and deep fry until puffy and golden.
Serve hot chole with bhature and onions.

recipes.name: Fish Curry (Bengali Style)
recipes.description: Mustard-oil based fish curry with poppy seeds, tangy and flavorful

ingredients.name: fish steaks (rohu or any firm fish)

steps.description: Marinate fish with salt and turmeric. Pan-fry lightly in mustard oil. Remove.
Soak mustard seeds and poppy seeds in warm water for 30 minutes. Grind to paste.
In remaining oil, add onion and sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste.
Add turmeric, chili powder, and ground mustard-poppy paste. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add water to make gravy. Bring to boil.
Gently add fish pieces and green chilies. Simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Finish with a drizzle of raw mustard oil and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Onion Uttapam
recipes.description: Thick South Indian rice pancake topped with onions and chilies

steps.description: Heat a tawa or griddle. Spread batter thicker than dosa.
Sprinkle onions, chilies, coriander, and cumin on top. Press gently.
Drizzle oil around edges. Cook until bottom is golden.
Flip and cook other side briefly. Serve with coconut chutney and sambar.

recipes.name: Malai Kofta
recipes.description: Fried paneer-potato dumplings in rich, creamy tomato gravy

steps.description: Mix paneer, potato, cornflour, salt. Divide into portions.
Stuff each with raisins and cashews, shape into balls. Deep fry until golden. Set aside.
For gravy: Sauté onion until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, then tomato purée. Cook until oil separates.
Add cashew paste and all spices. Cook for 2 minutes. Add water to adjust consistency.
Simmer for 5 minutes, then add cream.
Place koftas in serving dish and pour hot gravy over just before serving.

recipes.name: Mango Lassi
recipes.description: Sweet and creamy yogurt drink with mango pulp

steps.description: Blend all ingredients until smooth and frothy.
Pour into glasses and garnish with saffron or chopped pistachios.
Serve chilled.

recipes.name: Bisi Bele Bath
recipes.description: Karnataka-style spicy lentil-rice dish with vegetables and special masala

steps.description: Pressure cook rice and dal together with turmeric and vegetables until soft.
Mash slightly. Add tamarind, bisi bele bath powder, chili powder, salt, and water to desired consistency.
Simmer for 10 minutes.
Heat ghee, add mustard seeds, curry leaves, and cashews. Fry until golden.
Pour tempering over the dish. Garnish with coriander.
Serve hot with papad and raita.

recipes.name: Kheer (Rice Pudding)
recipes.description: Creamy Indian rice pudding flavored with cardamom and nuts

steps.description: Wash and soak rice for 30 minutes. Drain.
Bring milk to boil in heavy-bottomed pan.
Add rice and simmer on low heat, stirring frequently, until rice is soft and milk thickens (about 20-25 minutes).
Add sugar and cardamom. Cook for 5 more minutes.
Add saffron soaked in warm milk and rose water.
Garnish with nuts. Serve warm or chilled.

recipes.name: Hyderabadi Dum Biryani
recipes.description: Layered rice and meat dish cooked in sealed pot with aromatic spices

steps.description: Marinate meat with yogurt, ginger-garlic, biryani masala, chilies, mint, coriander, and salt for 2 hours.
Parboil rice with whole spices until 70% done. Drain.
Fry onions until golden and crisp. Set aside.
Layer half the rice in heavy pot, then marinated meat, then fried onions, mint, coriander.
Top with remaining rice, saffron milk, ghee, and lemon juice.
Seal pot with dough or tight lid. Cook on low heat (dum) for 30-40 minutes.
Let rest for 10 minutes, then gently mix before serving.

recipes.name: Dhokla
recipes.description: Soft and spongy steamed savory cake from Gujarat

steps.description: Mix besan, yogurt, water, ginger-chili paste, turmeric, salt, sugar to smooth batter. Rest 10 minutes.
Grease a steaming dish. Add fruit salt to batter, mix gently. Pour into dish.
Steam for 15 minutes until toothpick comes out clean.
Cool slightly, cut into squares.
For tempering: heat oil, add mustard seeds, sesame, curry leaves, green chilies.
Pour over dhokla with water and lemon juice. Garnish with coriander.

recipes.name: Rasmalai
recipes.description: Soft paneer dumplings soaked in sweetened, thickened milk flavored with cardamom

steps.description: Make paneer: boil milk, add lemon juice to curdle. Strain through muslin cloth. Rinse under cold water.
Hang for 30 minutes. Knead until smooth. Divide into small balls, flatten slightly.
Boil sugar and water to make syrup. Add paneer discs and cook covered for 15 minutes. Let cool in syrup.
For rabri: boil milk until reduced by half. Add cardamom and saffron.
Squeeze excess syrup from paneer discs and add to rabri.
Chill for at least 2 hours. Garnish with pistachios before serving.

recipes.name: Shorshe Ilish (Hilsa in Mustard Gravy)
recipes.description: Bengal's crown jewel - Hilsa fish cooked in a pungent mustard seed paste, traditionally prepared without onions or garlic to let the fish shine

steps.description: Soak mustard seeds in warm water for 30 minutes. Grind to a smooth paste with 2 green chilies and salt.
Marinate fish with turmeric and salt for 10 minutes.
Heat mustard oil until smoking, then cool slightly. Add mustard paste and remaining slit green chilies.
Add 1 cup warm water and bring to gentle simmer.
Gently place fish pieces in the gravy. Cover and cook on low heat for 8-10 minutes.
Serve hot with steamed rice.

recipes.name: Kosha Mangsho (Bengali Slow-Cooked Mutton Curry)
recipes.description: Dark, velvety mutton curry slow-cooked with spices in mustard oil until the meat falls off the bone

steps.description: Heat mustard oil until smoking. Reduce heat and add whole spices.
Add onions and fry until deep golden brown (15 minutes).
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook for 2 minutes.
Add mutton and cook on high heat until browned, about 8-10 minutes.
Add all powdered spices and cook for 5 minutes.
Lower heat, add yogurt gradually while stirring continuously.
Add 1 cup warm water, cover and simmer for 1 hour until meat is tender.
Uncover and cook until oil separates. Sprinkle garam masala and ghee.
Serve with luchi or rice.

recipes.name: Bhuna Khichuri (Bengali Spiced Rice and Lentil Porridge)
recipes.description: Comforting one-pot dish of rice and lentils, lightly spiced and slow-cooked, traditionally eaten on rainy days

steps.description: Dry roast moong dal until fragrant. Wash rice and dal together, soak for 20 minutes.
Heat ghee, add whole spices and cumin seeds.
Add ginger and green chilies, sauté for 1 minute.
Add vegetables and cook for 2 minutes.
Add rice-dal mixture and powdered spices. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add 4 cups hot water and salt. Bring to boil.
Cover and simmer on low heat until rice and dal are completely soft (about 20 minutes).
Serve hot with fried eggplant slices, pickles, and papad.

recipes.name: Fuchka (Bangladeshi Pani Puri)
recipes.description: Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced mashed potatoes and tangy tamarind water - a beloved Bangladeshi street food

steps.description: For pani: Blend mint, coriander, green chilies, ginger with cold water. Strain.
Add tamarind, lemon juice, black salt, and chaat masala. Chill thoroughly.
Mix mashed potatoes with chickpeas, chaat masala, chili powder, and black salt.
Make a small hole in each puri, stuff with potato mixture.
Dip in the tangy water and eat immediately.

recipes.name: Panta Bhaat (Fermented Rice)
recipes.description: Traditional Bangladeshi breakfast of leftover rice soaked overnight, served with accompaniments - a probiotic powerhouse

steps.description: Place leftover rice in a bowl, cover with water and add salt.
Cover and leave overnight at room temperature to ferment.
In the morning, drain excess water if desired.
Drizzle with mustard oil, top with onions, green chilies, and coriander.
Serve with fried fish, dried fish, or mashed potatoes.

recipes.name: Murgh Karahi (Pakistani Chicken Karahi)
recipes.description: Sizzling chicken curry cooked in a karahi (wok) with tomatoes, ginger, and aromatic spices

steps.description: Heat oil in a karahi or wok. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter.
Add onion and fry until golden. Add ginger and garlic, cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook on high heat until color changes, about 5 minutes.
Add tomatoes, green chilies, and all powdered spices except garam masala.
Cook on high heat until tomatoes break down and oil separates.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer until chicken is tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Sprinkle garam masala and black pepper. Garnish with coriander and ginger strips.
Serve with naan or roti.

recipes.name: Nihari (Slow-Cooked Pakistani Beef Stew)
recipes.description: Traditional breakfast stew of slow-cooked beef shanks with aromatic spices, simmered overnight

steps.description: Heat oil in a large pot. Fry onions until golden brown. Remove half for garnish.
Add ginger-garlic paste and beef. Cook until beef browns.
Add nihari masala and salt. Cook for 5 minutes until fragrant.
Add 6 cups hot water, bring to boil, then simmer on lowest heat for 3-4 hours until meat is falling apart.
Mix flour with 1/4 cup water to make a smooth paste. Add to stew, stirring continuously.
Simmer for another 30 minutes until gravy thickens.
Serve hot topped with fried onions, ginger, chilies, and coriander with naan.

recipes.name: Chapli Kabab (Peshawari Spiced Meat Patties)
recipes.description: Flat, round minced meat patties from Peshawar, packed with spices, pomegranate seeds, and coriander

steps.description: Mix all ingredients except oil in a large bowl. Knead well.
Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Divide mixture into 8 balls. Press each into flat, round patties.
Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
Fry patties until golden brown and cooked through, about 4-5 minutes per side.
Serve hot with naan, yogurt sauce, and salad.

recipes.name: Keema (Spiced Minced Meat Curry)
recipes.description: Fragrant minced meat curry with peas, perfect with naan or paratha

steps.description: Heat oil in a pan. Add onion and fry until golden brown.
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft and oil separates.
Add all powdered spices except garam masala. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add minced meat and break up lumps. Cook on high heat until meat browns.
Add 1/2 cup water, cover and simmer until meat is cooked and water evaporates.
Add peas and cook for 5 minutes. Sprinkle garam masala.
Garnish with coriander and ginger. Serve with naan or paratha.

recipes.name: Aloo Gosht (Potato and Meat Curry)
recipes.description: Hearty Pakistani curry where potatoes absorb the rich flavors of slow-cooked meat

steps.description: Heat oil in a pot. Fry onions until golden brown.
Add ginger-garlic paste and cook for 1 minute. Add meat and brown on all sides.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft. Add all powdered spices except garam masala.
