Add 2 cups water, bring to boil, then simmer covered until meat is almost tender (30-40 minutes).
Add potatoes and continue cooking until potatoes are tender and gravy thickens.
Sprinkle garam masala and garnish with green chilies and coriander.
Serve hot with roti or naan.

recipes.name: Bharawan Baingan (Punjabi Stuffed Eggplant)
recipes.description: Small eggplants stuffed with a aromatic spice mixture and slow-cooked until tender

steps.description: Wash eggplants and make a cross-cut from the bottom, leaving stem intact.
Mix onion, peanut powder, coconut, ginger-garlic paste, and all powdered spices to make stuffing.
Carefully stuff each eggplant with the spice mixture.
Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard and cumin seeds until they splutter.
Arrange stuffed eggplants in the pan. Cover and cook on low heat.
Turn occasionally and cook until eggplants are soft and tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot with roti or paratha.

recipes.name: Vada Pav (Mumbai's Beloved Burger)
recipes.description: The undisputed king of Mumbai street food - spicy potato fritter sandwiched in soft pav with chutneys

steps.description: For vada: Heat oil, add mustard seeds, then garlic, ginger, and green chilies.
Add mashed potatoes, turmeric, salt, coriander, and lemon juice. Mix well. Cool and shape into balls.
Make batter: Mix besan with water, salt, and baking soda to dipping consistency.
Heat oil. Dip potato balls in batter and deep fry until golden brown.
Slice pav horizontally. Spread chutneys on both sides.
Place vada in pav with a fried green chili. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Pav Bhaji (Mumbai's Vegetable Mash with Buttered Bread)
recipes.description: Buttery spiced vegetable mash served with toasted pav - originated as quick meal for textile mill workers

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables (potato, cauliflower, peas, carrot, bell pepper)

steps.description: Boil vegetables until soft. Drain and mash coarsely.
Heat 2 tbsp butter in a large pan. Add half the onion and sauté until soft.
Add ginger-garlic and green chili. Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Add pav bhaji masala, chili powder, turmeric. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add mashed vegetables and 1/2 cup water. Simmer for 10 minutes, mashing further.
Add remaining butter and lemon juice. Garnish with coriander.
Toast pav with butter on a griddle until golden.
Serve bhaji topped with chopped onion, with pav on the side.

recipes.name: Bhel Puri (Mumbai's Crunchy Chaat)
recipes.description: A symphony of puffed rice, sev, vegetables, and tangy chutneys creating an explosion of textures and flavors

steps.description: Combine puffed rice, half the sev, onions, tomatoes, and potatoes in a large bowl.
Add both chutneys, chaat masala, chili powder, and lemon juice.
Toss quickly and thoroughly to combine.
Garnish with remaining sev and coriander leaves.
Serve immediately before the puffed rice becomes soggy.

recipes.name: Mumbai Cutting Chai
recipes.description: The iconic spiced milk tea served in small 'cutting' glasses, enjoyed at countless roadside stalls

steps.description: Bring water to boil with ginger, cardamom, cinnamon, and cloves.
Add tea leaves and boil for 2-3 minutes until dark and aromatic.
Add milk and bring to a rolling boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Add sugar and strain into 'cutting' glasses. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Frankie (Mumbai Wrap)
recipes.description: Mumbai's iconic street wrap - flaky paratha rolled with spiced fillings and chutneys

steps.description: Knead flours with salt and oil into soft dough. Rest 20 minutes.
Divide into 4 balls. Roll each into thin circle.
Cook on hot tawa until golden spots appear. Keep warm.
If using egg, scramble and spread on paratha while cooking.
Spread green chutney on paratha, then tamarind chutney.
Place filling, onions, capsicum in center. Sprinkle chaat masala.
Roll tightly like a wrap, fold one end. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Mishti Doi (Bengali Sweet Yogurt)
recipes.description: Caramelized sweet yogurt set in earthen pots, a beloved Bengali dessert

steps.description: Boil milk in heavy-bottomed pan until reduced by one-third.
In separate pan, caramelize sugar until golden. Add to milk.
Cool milk until lukewarm (110°F). Add crumbled jaggery and mix.
Whisk curd starter smooth, add to milk mixture.
Pour into earthen pots. Cover and keep in warm place for 6-8 hours until set.
Refrigerate and serve chilled.

recipes.name: Shukto (Bengali Bitter-Sweet Vegetable Medley)
recipes.description: Traditional Bengali vegetable medley with bitter notes, served at the start of a meal

steps.description: Fry bitter gourd slices separately until crisp. Set aside.
Heat mustard oil, add panch phoron. Add ginger paste.
Add all vegetables except fried bitter gourd. Sauté for 5 minutes.
Add milk and water to cover. Simmer until vegetables are tender.
Add fried bitter gourd. Finish with ghee.
Serve as first course with rice.

recipes.name: Aloo Posto (Potatoes in Poppy Seed Paste)
recipes.description: Bengali comfort food - potatoes slow-cooked in creamy poppy seed paste with green chilies

steps.description: Soak poppy seeds in warm water for 30 minutes.
Grind poppy seeds with 2 green chilies to smooth paste.
Heat mustard oil until smoking. Cool slightly.
Add potato cubes and turmeric. Sauté for 5 minutes.
Add poppy seed paste and salt. Cook on low heat.
Add 1/4 cup warm water, cover and cook until potatoes are tender.
Slit remaining green chilies and add. Cook uncovered until dry.
Serve with rice and dal.

recipes.name: Haleem (Pakistani Meat and Lentil Porridge)
recipes.description: Slow-cooked meat, wheat, and lentil porridge, especially popular during Ramadan

steps.description: Soak wheat and dals together for 2 hours.
Pressure cook meat with ginger-garlic and salt until tender. Shred meat.
Cook wheat and dals in meat stock until completely soft and mushy.
Blend with immersion blender until smooth.
Fry sliced onions until golden and crisp. Set aside.
Add shredded meat to the mixture. Add all spices. Simmer for 1 hour.
Garnish with fried onions, ginger, chilies, and coriander.
Serve hot with lemon wedges and naan.

recipes.name: Seekh Kebab (Pakistani Spiced Minced Meat Skewers)
recipes.description: Fragrant minced meat skewers grilled to perfection, flavored with green papaya and aromatic spices

steps.description: Mix all ingredients except oil. Knead well for 5 minutes.
Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
Divide mixture into 8 portions. Shape each around skewers into long sausages.
Brush with oil. Grill or broil until cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve hot with mint chutney and onion rings.

recipes.name: Sajji (Balochi Whole Roasted Lamb)
recipes.description: Whole lamb marinated in salt and spices, slow-roasted to perfection - Balochistan's signature dish

ingredients.name: whole baby lamb or leg of lamb

steps.description: Make deep slits all over the lamb.
Mix all ingredients into a paste. Rub generously all over lamb and inside slits.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Preheat oven to 325°F. Place lamb on roasting rack.
Roast for 2.5-3 hours, basting occasionally, until meat is tender and skin is crispy.
Rest for 20 minutes before carving. Serve with roasted potatoes and rice.

recipes.name: Ragda Pattice (Mumbai Street Food)
recipes.description: Crispy potato patties topped with spiced white pea curry and chutneys

steps.description: Soak white peas overnight. Pressure cook with salt until soft.
For ragda: Temper oil with cumin, add onions, tomatoes, and spices. Add cooked peas and simmer.
Mix mashed potatoes with cornflour, ginger-chili paste, and salt. Shape into patties.
Shallow fry patties until golden on both sides.
Place patties in bowl, top with ragda, chutneys, onion, sev, and coriander.

recipes.name: Dabeli (Kutchi Dabeli)
recipes.description: Sweet-spicy potato filling in buttered pav, topped with peanuts and pomegranate - Kutch's gift to Mumbai

steps.description: Heat oil, add dabeli masala and mashed potatoes. Mix well and cook for 2 minutes.
Spread tamarind chutney on a flat surface. Spread potato mixture over it and press.
Sprinkle peanuts, pomegranate, sev, onion, coriander over potato.
Cut into squares and fill in pav that has been slit and toasted with butter.
Apply chutneys inside pav, stuff with potato mixture. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Jhalmuri (Bengali Puffed Rice Snack)
recipes.description: Bengal's iconic street snack - puffed rice tossed with mustard oil, vegetables, and spices

steps.description: Heat 1 teaspoon mustard oil and roast peanuts until crisp.
In a large bowl, combine puffed rice, chanachur, peanuts, and chopped vegetables.
Add remaining mustard oil, black salt, chaat masala, and lemon juice.
Toss thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
Add green chilies and coriander. Toss again and serve immediately in paper cones.

recipes.name: Kung Pao Chicken
recipes.description: Sichuan classic with diced chicken, peanuts, and vegetables in a spicy, numbing sauce

steps.description: Mix soy sauce, vinegar, hoisin, sugar, cornstarch, and 2 tbsp water. Set aside.
Heat oil in wok over high heat. Add peppercorns and chilies, stir-fry until fragrant.
Add chicken and stir-fry until white, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic, ginger, and bell pepper. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Stir sauce and add to wok. Cook until thickened.
Add peanuts and scallions. Toss and serve with rice.

recipes.name: General Tso's Chicken
recipes.description: Crispy deep-fried chicken in a sweet and slightly spicy sauce - a Chinese-American favorite

steps.description: Marinate chicken with 1 tbsp soy sauce and egg. Coat with cornstarch-flour mixture.
Heat oil to 350°F. Fry chicken in batches until golden and crispy, about 4-5 minutes. Drain.
In small bowl, mix remaining soy sauce, vinegar, hoisin, sugar, and broth.
Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok. Add chilies, garlic, ginger. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add sauce mixture and bring to simmer until slightly thickened.
Return chicken to wok, toss to coat. Garnish with scallions.

recipes.name: Char Siu (Chinese BBQ Pork)
recipes.description: Cantonese-style roasted pork with sweet-savory glaze and signature red color

steps.description: Mix all ingredients except pork to make marinade.
Add pork strips, coat well. Marinate overnight in refrigerator.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Line baking sheet with foil, place rack on top.
Place pork on rack, reserve marinade. Roast for 20 minutes.
Brush with reserved marinade and honey. Roast 15 more minutes until caramelized.
Let rest 10 minutes before slicing. Serve with rice or in bao buns.

recipes.name: Mapo Tofu
recipes.description: Sichuan specialty with silken tofu in spicy, numbing sauce with ground pork

steps.description: Gently cube tofu and set aside. Mix cornstarch with 2 tbsp cold water.
Heat oil in wok. Add pork and cook until no longer pink.
Add doubanjiang, garlic, ginger. Stir-fry until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add broth, soy sauce, and chili oil. Bring to simmer.
Carefully add tofu cubes. Simmer gently for 5 minutes.
Add cornstarch slurry and stir gently until sauce thickens.
Sprinkle with Sichuan peppercorns and scallions. Serve with rice.

recipes.name: Egg Drop Soup
recipes.description: Simple, comforting soup with silky egg ribbons in savory broth

steps.description: Bring broth to simmer. Mix cornstarch with 2 tbsp cold water.
Stir cornstarch slurry into simmering broth. Cook until slightly thickened.
Beat eggs with sesame oil and turmeric.
Stir broth in circular motion, slowly drizzle in eggs to form ribbons.
Remove from heat immediately. Season with white pepper and salt.
Garnish with scallions and serve hot.

recipes.name: Spring Rolls
recipes.description: Crispy fried rolls filled with vegetables and sometimes meat

steps.description: Stir-fry pork until cooked. Add garlic, then vegetables. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil. Cook until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Cool filling completely.
Place wrapper with corner toward you. Add filling, fold sides, roll tightly, seal with cornstarch slurry.
Heat oil to 350°F. Fry spring rolls until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain and serve with sweet chili sauce.

recipes.name: Hot and Sour Soup
recipes.description: Tangy, spicy soup with mushrooms, tofu, and bamboo shoots

steps.description: Soak wood ear mushrooms in hot water until soft. Slice thinly.
Bring broth to simmer. Add pork and cook for 2 minutes.
Add mushrooms, bamboo shoots, and tofu. Simmer for 5 minutes.
Add soy sauce, vinegar, white pepper, and chili oil.
Mix cornstarch with 1/4 cup cold water. Stir into soup to thicken.
Slowly drizzle in beaten egg while stirring to form ribbons.
Finish with sesame oil and scallions. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Scallion Pancakes
recipes.description: Flaky, crispy Chinese flatbread with layers of scallions

steps.description: Mix flour and salt. Add hot water, stir, then cold water. Knead into smooth dough. Rest 30 minutes.
Divide dough into 4 balls. Roll each into thin circle, brush with sesame oil.
Sprinkle scallions evenly over surface. Roll up like a cigar, then coil into spiral.
Roll out again into 1/4-inch thick pancake.
Heat oil in skillet. Fry pancake until golden and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels. Cut into wedges and serve with soy-vinegar dipping sauce.

recipes.name: Beef and Broccoli
recipes.description: Tender beef and crisp broccoli in a savory ginger-garlic sauce

steps.description: Toss beef with 1 tablespoon cornstarch. Set aside.
Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain.
Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, brown sugar, and remaining cornstarch with 1/4 cup water.
Heat oil in wok over high heat. Add beef and stir-fry until browned, about 2 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 30 seconds.
Add broccoli and sauce. Stir-fry until sauce thickens, about 1 minute.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve.

recipes.name: Fried Rice
recipes.description: Classic Chinese fried rice with eggs, vegetables, and choice of protein

steps.description: Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok. Scramble eggs, remove and set aside.
Add remaining oil. Add garlic and scallions, stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add rice, breaking up clumps. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add vegetables and protein. Stir-fry until heated through.
Add soy sauce around edges of wok. Toss to combine.
Return eggs to wok, add sesame oil, toss. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Wonton Soup
recipes.description: Delicate pork and shrimp dumplings in clear, savory broth

steps.description: Mix pork, shrimp, scallions, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch.
Place 1 tsp filling on wonton wrapper. Wet edges, fold into triangle, then bring corners together.
Bring broth to simmer. Add wontons and cook for 4-5 minutes until they float.
Add bok choy and cook for 2 minutes.
Season with white pepper. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Dan Dan Noodles
recipes.description: Sichuan street food noodles with spicy minced pork and chili oil

steps.description: Cook noodles according to package. Drain and set aside.
Brown pork in skillet. Add preserved vegetable and cook for 2 minutes.
Mix soy sauce, chili oil, sesame paste, and broth in bowl.
Divide sauce among serving bowls. Top with noodles.
Add pork mixture, sprinkle with peppercorn powder, garlic, and scallions.
Toss well before eating.

recipes.name: Sesame Chicken
recipes.description: Crispy chicken pieces coated in sweet, savory sauce with toasted sesame seeds

steps.description: Marinate chicken with egg and 1 tbsp soy sauce. Coat with cornstarch-flour mixture.
Heat oil to 350°F. Fry chicken until golden and crispy, about 4-5 minutes. Drain.
Mix remaining soy sauce, hoisin, honey, vinegar, and sesame oil.
Heat small pan, add garlic and sauce mixture. Simmer until slightly thickened.
Toss chicken in sauce. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and scallions.

recipes.name: Lo Mein
recipes.description: Soft noodles stir-fried with vegetables and protein in savory sauce

steps.description: Cook noodles according to package. Drain and rinse with cold water.
Heat oil in wok. Add protein and stir-fry until cooked. Remove.
Add garlic and vegetables. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Return protein to wok. Add noodles and all sauces.
Toss everything together until well combined and heated through.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve.

recipes.name: Crab Rangoon
recipes.description: Crispy wontons filled with cream cheese and crab - a Chinese-American favorite

steps.description: Mix cream cheese, crab, green onions, Worcestershire, soy sauce, and garlic powder.
Place 1 tsp filling in center of wonton wrapper.
Wet edges, bring corners together to form pouch or fold into triangle.
Heat oil to 350°F. Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Drain and serve with sweet and sour sauce.

recipes.name: Moo Shu Pork
recipes.description: Stir-fried pork, eggs, and vegetables served with thin pancakes and hoisin sauce

steps.description: Soak wood ears and lily flowers in hot water until soft. Slice thinly.
Heat oil in wok. Scramble eggs, remove and set aside.
Stir-fry pork until no longer pink. Add ginger.
Add mushrooms, lily flowers, cabbage. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Return eggs to wok. Add soy sauce, rice wine, and sesame oil.
Serve with pancakes and hoisin sauce. Spread hoisin on pancake, add filling, roll up.

recipes.name: Egg Foo Young
recipes.description: Fluffy Chinese omelets with vegetables and meat, served with savory gravy

steps.description: Beat eggs. Add vegetables, protein, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Heat oil in skillet. Pour 1/2 cup egg mixture per patty.
Cook until golden on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side. Keep warm.
For gravy: simmer broth and oyster sauce. Thicken with cornstarch slurry.
Pour gravy over egg foo young and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Har Gow (Shrimp Dumplings)
recipes.description: Translucent shrimp dumplings - a dim sum favorite

steps.description: Mix shrimp, bamboo shoots, pork fat, cornstarch, sesame oil, pepper, and sugar. Chill.
Mix wheat starch and cornstarch. Add boiling water and stir quickly. Add oil and knead into dough.
Roll dough into log, cut into 12 pieces. Roll each into thin circle.
Place filling in center, pleat to seal, leaving top translucent.
Steam in bamboo steamer for 6-8 minutes. Serve with soy sauce.

recipes.name: Siu Mai (Pork and Shrimp Dumplings)
recipes.description: Open-topped dumplings with pork, shrimp, and mushrooms

ingredients.name: fish roe or carrot for garnish

steps.description: Mix pork, shrimp, mushrooms, scallions, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, and sugar.
Place wrapper in palm. Add 1 tbsp filling in center.
Bring sides up, leaving top open. Gently squeeze to shape.
Garnish with fish roe or carrot.
Steam for 8 minutes. Serve with chili oil or soy sauce.

recipes.name: Sweet and Sour Pork
recipes.description: Crispy pork with bell peppers, pineapple, and tangy sweet-sour sauce

steps.description: Coat pork with cornstarch. Deep fry until golden and cooked through. Drain.
Mix vinegar, ketchup, sugar, soy sauce, and 1/2 cup water for sauce.
Stir-fry peppers and onion for 1 minute. Add pineapple.
Add sauce mixture and bring to simmer. Thicken with cornstarch slurry.
Return pork to wok, toss to coat. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Orange Chicken
recipes.description: Crispy chicken in tangy, sweet orange sauce with red chili flakes

steps.description: Coat chicken with egg, then cornstarch-flour mixture. Deep fry until golden. Drain.
Mix orange juice, zest, soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and broth.
Heat small pan, sauté garlic and ginger. Add sauce and chili flakes.
Simmer until slightly thickened. Toss with fried chicken.
Garnish with extra orange zest and serve.

recipes.name: Chow Mein
recipes.description: Crispy pan-fried noodles with stir-fried vegetables and meat

steps.description: Boil noodles until just tender. Drain and rinse.
Heat oil in wok. Add noodles and press into a flat layer. Cook until crispy on bottom.
Flip and crisp other side. Remove noodles.
Stir-fry protein until cooked. Add garlic and vegetables.
Return noodles to wok, add sauces, toss to combine.
Serve with crispy noodles on top.

recipes.name: Salt and Pepper Squid
recipes.description: Crispy fried squid tossed with salt, pepper, garlic, and chilies

steps.description: Cut squid into rings, pat completely dry.
Mix cornstarch, rice flour, Sichuan pepper, white pepper, and salt.
Dredge squid in seasoned flour, shake off excess.
Heat oil to 375°F. Fry squid in batches for 1-2 minutes until crispy. Drain.
Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok. Stir-fry garlic and chilies for 30 seconds.
Add squid and toss. Garnish with scallions and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Peking Duck Pancakes
recipes.description: Crispy duck skin and meat wrapped in thin pancakes with cucumber and hoisin sauce

steps.description: Pour boiling water over duck to tighten skin. Pat dry.
Mix honey, soy sauce, five-spice. Brush over duck.
Air-dry in refrigerator uncovered overnight.
Roast at 350°F for 1 hour 15 minutes until skin is crispy.
Let rest, then slice skin and meat thinly.
Serve with pancakes, hoisin, cucumber, and scallions.

recipes.name: Tanghulu (Candied Fruit Skewers)
recipes.description: Crispy sugar-coated fruit skewers - a popular Chinese street snack

steps.description: Thread 3 fruits onto each skewer.
Combine sugar and water in saucepan. Heat without stirring until 300°F (hard crack stage).
Dip each skewer into sugar syrup, twirling to coat evenly.
Place on parchment paper or oiled surface to harden.
Serve immediately - the sugar coating should be glass-hard and crackly.

recipes.name: Japanese Yogurt Cheesecake (Viral 2-Ingredient Dessert)
recipes.description: The viral TikTok sensation - a super easy no-bake dessert made with just yogurt and cookies that went viral with over 2.6 million searches globally [citation:2]

steps.description: Line a small loaf pan or container with plastic wrap.
Spread a layer of yogurt at the bottom.
Press cookies into the yogurt in a single layer.
Repeat layers, ending with yogurt on top.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours until cookies soften to cake-like consistency.
Invert onto plate, slice, and serve.

recipes.name: Dujjonku (Dubai Chewy Cookie)
recipes.description: Viral Korean trend featuring pistachio cream and kataifi pastry in a marshmallow-stuffed cookie - searches skyrocketed 3,700% in one month [citation:2]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Line baking sheet with parchment.
Cream butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in egg and vanilla.
Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt until just combined.
Divide dough into 8 balls. Flatten each, place marshmallow in center, and wrap dough around it.
Mix pistachio cream with toasted kataifi. Spoon mixture over each cookie ball.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until edges golden. Dust with cocoa powder while warm.

recipes.name: Flaky Puff Crust Pizza (King Arthur's 2026 Recipe of the Year)
recipes.description: The crowned Recipe of the Year for 2026 - a revolutionary laminated crust pizza that's shatteringly flaky like a croissant [citation:10]

steps.description: Grate frozen butter and keep frozen. Mix flour, yeast, salt, sugar, water, and oil into dough. Rest 30 minutes.
Roll dough to rectangle. Sprinkle with most of frozen butter, fold letter-style. Repeat with remaining butter.
Roll to fit half-sheet pan (13x18 inches). Let rest until puffy.
Preheat oven to 475°F. Top with sauce, Parmesan, and both mozzarellas.
Bake 15-17 minutes until golden and bubbly.
Mix olive oil, minced basil, garlic, lemon juice. Drizzle over hot pizza.

recipes.name: Mortadella and Pistachio Pizza
recipes.description: 2026 trending pizza featuring creamy burrata, mortadella, and pistachio crust [citation:5]

steps.description: Work half the crushed pistachios into the dough while stretching.
Drizzle with olive oil and arrange mozzarella slices.
Bake at high heat (500°F) until golden.
Remove from oven, top with torn burrata and mortadella slices.
Sprinkle with remaining pistachios, basil, and chili oil.

recipes.name: Dolce Pizza (Sweet Ricotta Dessert Pizza)
recipes.description: Divine sweet pizza from Marco's Coal-Fired Pizza featuring sweetened ricotta and toasted almonds [citation:5]

steps.description: Blend ricotta with powdered sugar and half the almonds.
Stretch pizza dough into shape. Lightly fry in skillet until golden. Cool.
Top with sweetened ricotta mixture.
Drizzle with honey and sprinkle with remaining almonds and powdered sugar.

recipes.name: Spanish Chorizo and Manchego Pizza
recipes.description: Bold pizza featuring spicy chorizo, manchego cheese, and piquante peppers [citation:5]

steps.description: Cook chorizo and drain fat on paper towel.
Stretch dough, top with salsa, chorizo, and cheeses.
Add piquante peppers and brush edges with olive oil.
Bake at 450°F until golden. Garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Fig and Gorgonzola Pizza with Prosciutto
recipes.description: Sweet and savory masterpiece with fig jam, Gorgonzola, and Prosciutto di Parma [citation:5]

steps.description: Stretch dough, top with mozzarella and Gorgonzola. Bake at 550-600°F for 4-5 minutes.
Remove, dollop with fig jam, return to oven until jam melts.
Cool slightly, top with arugula, twisted prosciutto slices, and fig wedges.
Sprinkle with almonds, drizzle with more fig jam and olive oil.

recipes.name: Italian Lemon Ricotta Cake (Australia's #1 Most-Saved Cake)
recipes.description: The most-saved cake recipe in Australia - a moist Sicilian lemon cake so good they eat it for breakfast [citation:4]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and line a 9-inch springform pan.
Cream butter, sugar, and lemon zest until pale and fluffy.
Beat in ricotta gradually, then eggs one at a time.
Fold in flour and polenta, then lemon juice.
Pour into pan and bake 45-50 minutes until golden and skewer comes clean.
Cool in pan 10 minutes, then transfer to wire rack.

recipes.name: Lemon Drizzle Cake (Paul Hollywood's Favorite)
recipes.description: British classic with a crunchy lemon syrup topping - called 'favorite cake of all time' by the Great British Bake Off judge [citation:9]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and line a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Beat butter and sugar until pale and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time.
Fold in flour, salt, lemon zest, and juice. Pour into pan.
Bake 55-60 minutes until skewer comes clean.
Poke holes all over cake. Mix drizzle sugar and juice, pour over hot cake.
Cool completely (at least 3 hours) until crunchy topping forms.

recipes.name: Carrot Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
recipes.description: The ultimate carrot cake - rated 5 stars by hundreds of home bakers [citation:4]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease two 9-inch round pans.
Whisk flour, baking powder, soda, spices, and salt.
Beat oil and sugars, then eggs and vanilla. Fold in dry ingredients, then carrots.
Divide batter and bake 30-35 minutes. Cool completely.
Beat cream cheese and butter until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar.
Frost cooled cake and refrigerate until serving.

recipes.name: Apple Cinnamon Custard Cake
recipes.description: Classic apple cake with a secret ingredient of Grand Marnier and orange zest [citation:4]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
Toss apple slices with 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon.
Beat oil and remaining sugar, then eggs, Grand Marnier, and zest.
Fold in flour, baking powder, salt, then cream.
Pour half batter, layer apples, top with remaining batter.
Bake 40-45 minutes until golden. Serve warm or room temperature.

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Chicken Piccata
recipes.description: One-pan take on the classic Italian dish - no stovetop required [citation:8]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 400°F. Arrange chicken on sheet pan.
Top with lemon slices and garlic. Drizzle with oil.
Bake 20-25 minutes until chicken is cooked.
Transfer chicken to plate. Add broth and butter to pan juices, stir to combine.
Pour sauce over chicken, sprinkle with capers and parsley.

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Harissa and Orange Chicken
recipes.description: Bold North African-inspired sheet pan dinner with harissa, honey, and chickpeas [citation:8]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F. Mix harissa, honey, orange juice and zest, and spices.
Toss chicken and onion in marinade. Arrange on sheet pan with chickpeas.
Roast 25-30 minutes until chicken is cooked.
Garnish with cilantro and serve.

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Gnocchi with Sausage and Broccoli Rabe
recipes.description: Simple one-pan dinner where gnocchi roasts alongside sausage and vegetables [citation:8]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F. Toss all ingredients except Parmesan on sheet pan.
Roast 20-25 minutes until gnocchi are golden and sausage cooked.
Sprinkle with Parmesan and serve.

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Caponata with Cod
recipes.description: Sicilian-inspired sweet-sour vegetable medley with roasted cod [citation:8]

steps.description: Preheat oven to 425°F. Toss vegetables with oil, roast 10 minutes.
Push vegetables aside, place cod on pan. Roast 8-10 more minutes.
Mix vinegar and sugar, drizzle over vegetables. Sprinkle with capers and basil.

recipes.name: Jollof Rice (West African Classic)
recipes.description: Vibrant one-pot rice dish from West Africa, the source of friendly rivalry between Nigeria and Ghana [citation:6]

steps.description: Blend tomatoes, bell pepper, and scotch bonnet together until smooth.
Heat oil in pot, sauté onions until soft. Add tomato paste and fry for 2 minutes.
Add blended tomato mixture and cook until reduced and oil separates.
Add stock, thyme, curry, bay leaf, and salt. Bring to boil.
Add rice, reduce heat, cover and simmer 30-35 minutes until rice is tender.
Serve with fried plantains and grilled chicken.

recipes.name: Beef Bulgogi (Korean BBQ)
recipes.description: Paper-thin beef in sweet-savory marinade, one of the oldest continuously prepared dishes in the world [citation:6]

steps.description: Mix soy sauce, sugar, pear, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger.
Add beef and marinate for at least 1 hour.
Heat a skillet or grill over high heat. Cook beef in batches until caramelized, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Garnish with scallions and sesame seeds. Serve with rice and lettuce wraps.

recipes.name: Shakshuka (North African Eggs)
recipes.description: Eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce, traditionally eaten from the communal cooking pan [citation:6]

steps.description: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil until soft. Add garlic and spices.
Add tomatoes and simmer 10 minutes until thickened.
Make wells and crack eggs into sauce. Cover and cook until eggs are set.
Sprinkle with feta and cilantro. Serve with crusty bread.

recipes.name: Swedish Meatballs
recipes.description: Petite meatballs with nutmeg and allspice, served with creamy gravy and lingonberry jam [citation:6]

steps.description: Soak breadcrumbs in milk. Mix with meats, onion, egg, and spices. Form into small balls.
Brown meatballs in butter in batches. Remove and set aside.
Add broth to pan, scrape up bits. Stir in cream and simmer until thickened.
Return meatballs to gravy and simmer 5 minutes.
Serve with mashed potatoes and lingonberry jam.

recipes.name: Moroccan Chickpea Stew
recipes.description: Aromatic one-pot stew with sweet potatoes, chickpeas, and warm spices [citation:6]

steps.description: Sauté onion until soft. Add garlic and spices, cook 1 minute.
Add sweet potato, tomatoes, broth, and harissa. Simmer 15 minutes.
Add chickpeas and cook 10 more minutes until sweet potato is tender.
Meanwhile, prepare couscous according to package.
Serve stew over couscous with yogurt and fresh mint.

recipes.name: Greek Moussaka
recipes.description: Layered eggplant, spiced lamb, and potatoes under creamy béchamel [citation:6]

steps.description: Salt eggplant slices, let sit 30 minutes. Rinse, pat dry, and fry until golden.
Brown lamb with onion. Add garlic, wine, tomatoes, and spices. Simmer 30 minutes.
Make béchamel: melt butter, add flour, whisk in milk until thick. Cool, beat in eggs and Parmesan.
Layer potatoes, eggplant, and meat sauce in baking dish. Top with béchamel.
Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes until golden. Rest 15 minutes before serving.

recipes.name: Falafel Wraps
recipes.description: Crispy chickpea fritters in warm flatbread with tahini sauce and fresh vegetables [citation:6]

steps.description: Process chickpeas with herbs, onion, garlic, and spices until finely ground.
Add baking powder, shape into balls or patties. Deep fry until golden brown.
Warm pita bread. Spread tahini sauce, add falafel and vegetables.
Roll and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
recipes.description: Fiery grilled chicken marinated in Scotch bonnet peppers and allspice [citation:6]

steps.description: Blend all ingredients except chicken into a paste.
Coat chicken with jerk paste. Marinate overnight.
Grill over medium-high heat until charred and cooked through, about 25-30 minutes.
Rest 5 minutes before serving with rice and peas.

recipes.name: Char, Smoke and Flame-Grilled Prawns
recipes.description: 2026 MICHELIN Guide trend - simple shellfish grilled over charcoal with fermented soy [citation:7]

steps.description: Mix fermented soy, sesame oil, rice wine, and garlic.
Brush prawns with mixture. Grill over hot charcoal for 2-3 minutes per side.
Finish with lime juice and fresh coriander. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Fermented Vegetable Bowl with Koji
recipes.description: 2026 trend of using time as an ingredient - depth through lacto-fermentation [citation:7]

steps.description: Toss vegetables with salt and koji. Pack in jar and ferment at room temperature for 3-5 days.
Rinse fermented vegetables and pat dry.
Sauté vegetables briefly in sesame oil. Add soy sauce.
Serve over brown rice with soft-boiled egg and sesame seeds.
